name: Aru
newQuote: Heh heh. Good choice.
profile:
The self-proclaimed boss of Problem Solver 68.

Aru expanded Gehenna Academy's Problem Solver 68 club without permission to conduct illegal business activities. She aspires to be seen as a dashing and debonair villain, but her frequent blunders always expose her as a poser.

weapon.name: Wine Red/Admire
weapon.desc:
A semi-automatic sniper rifle with an antique design cherished by Aru.

Her hard-boiled nature intensifies just by carrying it.

bondGear.name: Aru's Very Precious Wallet
bondGear.desc: A high-quality wallet Aru loves. Although it's made of fine material, it's faded and scratched due to long use. Haruka, Kayoko, and Mutsuki saved up and gave it to Aru as a gift after Problem Solver 68 was first established, so it's irreplaceable to her.

name: Eimi
newQuote: How can I fight more effectively?
profile:
An agent of the Super Phenomenon Task Force at the Millennium School.

An emotionally inscrutable oddball, Eimi very rarely speaks and can often be found staring off into space for no particular reason. However, there's no one as brutally efficient as her when it comes to carrying out missions for Seminar.

weapon.name: Multi Tactical
weapon.desc:
Eimi's favorite shotgun with a crude design.

Multifaceted like its name suggests, used on everything from forced breakthroughs to dealing with supernatural phenomena.

bondGear.name: Cute Cooling Fan
bondGear.desc:
Eimi's secret weapon against her greatest enemy: the heat.
It may be adorable, but this fan packs a strong blast. It doesn't reach very far, however, so gather close if you want to cool down.

name: Haruna
newQuote: Shall we explore the world of fine dining?
profile:
President of the Gehenna Gourmet Research Society.

At a glance, she appears to possess the graceful charisma of a refined lady. But when it comes to food, she can turn into a deranged maniac at the flip of a switch. Despite her uncontrollable gluttony, she actually can't stomach too much food at once. Her favorite foods are those rich in fat, such as motsunabe and horumonyaki.

weapon.name: Ideal
weapon.desc:
An elegant sniper rifle used by Haruna.

She claims she can see the path to becoming the ultimate gourmand through the scope.

name: Hifumi
hobbies: Peroro merch, shopping, listening to others
newQuote: If Sensei's going to be with me...I'm going to give my all!
profile:
A friendly, outgoing member of the Trinity Make-Up Work Club.

Hifumi's just a regular girl with average grades, but she's nonetheless well liked and popular for her well-rounded personality. She's a good listener for anyone who needs to vent about their worries or problems, but this also causes her to get swept up in the moment and unintentionally cause trouble.

weapon.name: My Necessity
weapon.desc:
A pink rifle carried around by Hifumi.

Hifumi doesn't go anywhere without this cute pink-painted rifle.

name: Hina
newQuote:
It's annoying, but I should take care of it.
That's my job.
profile:
Head prefect of the Gehenna Academy Prefect Team.

Somewhat aloof and considers almost everything a bother and a chore, but is still every bit the head prefect of the Prefect Team when it comes to rules and regulations.
Her general response to most things is "Ugh, so annoying," but she's ruthless and decisive when it comes to matters on the battlefield.
Feared and respected by the enemies of Gehenna.

weapon.name: Destroyer of Denouement
weapon.desc:
A multipurpose machine gun Hina wields as naturally as any limb.

Blows away school rule violators and degenerates with its ruthlessly destructive power.

bondGear.name: Hina's Prefect Team Armband
bondGear.desc: Hina's armband from the Prefect Team. To others, it might appear as merely a symbol of affiliation, but for Hina, it's a significant reminder of her responsibilities as the Head Prefect. The weight of that armband is anything but light.

name: Hoshino
newQuote:
It's way past my nap time,
but I'll help if you want me to.
profile:
The Abydos Student Council vice president and president of the Foreclosure Task Force.

Acts more like a tired old timer and would rather play pranks than do actual work. This often gets her into trouble with her fellow task force members, but once on a mission, she fights harder on the front lines than anyone else to keep her friends safe.

weapon.name: Eye of Horus
weapon.desc:
Hoshino's favorite shotgun with a simple design.

The normally lazy Hoshino never slacks when it comes to weapon maintenance.

bondGear.name: Universal Entry Ticket
bondGear.desc: Hoshino claims this pillow lets you enter dreamland wherever you are. It's as soft and fluffy as promised, but unfortunately it's also unique, and not sold in stores.

name: Iori
newQuote: No mercy for criminals!
profile:
A cold-blooded specialist of Gehenna Academy's Prefect Team.

She uses her overwhelming force as field captain to ruthlessly discipline offenders. Iori is highly efficient and formidable in combat, but her stubbornness causes her to fall for even the most obvious traps.

weapon.name: Crack Shot
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle used by Iori to deal with fugitives.

A bare-bones sniper rifle that lacks even a scope because, Iori says, a specialist never blames their tools.

name: Maki
newQuote: Art comes from the soul!
profile:
A member of Veritas, a hacker group at Millennium Science School.

A mischievous student who enjoys drawing graffiti and designed Veritas' emblem. She has a flighty personality and doesn't take anything seriously, which often sparks conflict with other clubs.

weapon.name: Auto Lacquer
weapon.desc:
Maki's multipurpose machine gun often used when drawing graffiti.

Modified using Millennium's technology, it can load and fire paintballs along with live ammunition.

name: Neru
newQuote: Shout! Give it everything you've got!
profile:
President of C&C, a secret organization of the Millennium School.

At first glance, Neru looks like nothing but a young delinquent with a flashy bomber jacket draped over her maid uniform, but in reality she's Millennium's most formidable agent. Within Millennium, her call sign, Double O, is seen as a sign of certain victory.

weapon.name: Twin Dragons
weapon.desc:
A pair of SMGs used by Neru.

Both are lavishly engraved with a golden dragon pattern.

bondGear.name: Neru's Bomber Jacket
bondGear.desc: A bomber jacket that Neru doesn't want to separate from for a single moment. If you ask her about it, she has a very simple answer for you...

name: Izumi
newQuote: The world is full of delicious food!
profile:
A member of the Gehenna Gourmet Research Society with a voracious appetite.

She loves food so much that she even gobbles up dishes that others would dislike with gusto.

weapon.name: Daily Cutlery
weapon.desc:
A heavy machine gun used by Izumi.

The more troublemakers the gun defeats, the more delicious her food becomes.

bondGear.name: Lucky Hot Dog
bondGear.desc:
This 3D-printed hot dog is so realistic, you think you can almost smell the mustard.
Izumi swears this plastic hot dog is lucky and brings her to good food every time she carries it with her. We're not sure if the bite marks are part of the design or if Izumi took a bite...

name: Shiroko
newQuote: Do you need my help?
profile:
The sporty field captain of the Abydos Foreclosure Task Force.

A girl of few words and almost no facial expression, Shiroko gives the impression of being frigid and emotionless. In truth, she is more devoted to Abydos High School than anything else. If it's for the sake of revitalizing the academy, she'll do whatever it takes and sometimes propose some outlandish ideas herself.

weapon.name: White Fang 465
weapon.desc:
Shiroko's favorite assault rifle.

Always ready to be used in any situation due to diligent maintenance.

bondGear.name: Shiroko's Drone
bondGear.desc: A drone that Shiroko always has on standby. She claims it is for filming herself exercising, but there are many upgrades attached that seem to serve other purposes.

name: Shun
newQuote: Have you been waiting patiently for me? My, you're such a good kid.
profile:
Instructor of Shanhaijing's Disciplinary Support Department, Plum Blossom Garden.

An instructor to young students at the Plum Blossom Garden. The little students hold her and Shanhaijing in high regard. She is seldom angered by the mischievous antics of her young students due to her extensive experience. However, asking her age is off limits.

weapon.name: Whip of Love
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle inlaid with Shun's favorite pattern.

Any naughty child becomes obedient in front of Shun's Whip of Love.

name: Sumire
newQuote: Shall we start today's training?
profile:
Leader of the Millennium Athletic Training Club.

An athletic girl with a passion for physical training. She is very much a jock and believes all problems can be solved with muscles and exercise.

weapon.name: Modern Millennium Dumbbell
weapon.desc:
A semi-automatic shotgun that Sumire uses regularly when exercising.

Can improve one's health by doing a push-up with each shot fired.

bondGear.name: Mobile Sandbag
bondGear.desc: A sandbag shaped like a gaiter that can be worn around an arm or leg. It's filled with not just sand but also iron powder, making it much heavier than it looks.

name: Tsurugi
newQuote: It's time to hunt!
profile:
President of Trinity's Justice Task Force and its official secret weapon.

She is belligerent and violent, with a tendency to destroy anything she doesn't like. However, thanks to the painstaking efforts of the task force's vice president, Hasumi, the club has managed to hold itself together. Tsurugi is like a beast that can't be controlled, but even she can't help but soften up when she's with her Sensei.

weapon.name: Blood 'n' Gunpowder
weapon.desc:
Twin shotguns used by Tsurugi.

One is named "Blood" and the other is named "Gunpowder."
Both are equally terrifying, with no particular distinction between them.

bondGear.name: Tsurugi's Special Chest
bondGear.desc: A box full of goods hiding deep inside Tsurugi's room. Various, random things are piled up in it: collectibles, books, movie tickets, and more. You can get a glimpse of Tsurugi's meticulousness just by looking at how neatly everything's organized, without a single speck of dust.

name: Izuna
hobbies: Studying the art of ninjutsu, serving her lord
newQuote: Anything for my lord!
profile:
A member of Hyakkiyako Academy's Ninjutsu Research Club.

A bright and bubbly young girl, but her devotion to her strange dream has caused her to spend most of her life as a loner. She devotes herself every day to becoming the best ninja she can be. This also includes following Sensei around and referring to them as "my lord," among other things.

weapon.name: Izuna-Style Super Ninja Tool
weapon.desc:
Izuna's favorite submachine gun.

A cutting-edge ninja tool used in conjunction with Izuna-Style Ninjutsu. Can fire smoke bombs and even massage her lord's shoulders. Its uses are endless.

name: Aris
newQuote: I've been waiting for your call for a long time.
profile:
A member of the Game Development Department at the Millennium School.

A mysterious girl who was found sleeping within some ruins. All information regarding Aris' age and origins is unknown. Currently, she has become a hardcore video game fanatic thanks to Midori and Momoi. The majority of her inarticulate speech is comprised of dialog from retro video games.

weapon.name: Supernova: The Sword of Light
weapon.desc:
A massive railgun Aris received from the Engineering Department.

Its weight and power output are so great that ordinary students would have trouble just carrying it.

bondGear.name: アリスの花丸シール
bondGear.desc:
幸運が上昇し、万事うまくいく！というわけではないが……
アリスの真心が込められたシール。

name: Midori
newQuote: I'm very proud of how this illustration turned out!
profile:
Illustrator of the Game Development Department at the Millennium School.

Both Midori and her twin sister, Momoi, develop games with the Game Development Department.
Though her introverted personality had previously put her at odds with her more gregarious older sister, the two are now inseparable thanks to their shared love of video games.

weapon.name: Fresh Inspiration
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle used by Midori.

Fitted with an accessory from her big sister, which Midori fidgets with in a pinch. It always seems to spark an idea.

bondGear.name: Handheld Game Console
bondGear.desc: The first portable game console that Midori bought with her sister. It holds precious memories of fighting, making up, ice cream bets, and more.

name: Cherino
hobbies: Doling out demerits, purges, snowball fights
newQuote: Feel the glory of facing me!
profile:
Student council president of Red Winter Academy.

Greedy and obsessed with power, she loses her position in a revolution once a week but somehow always regains her authority. Cherino believes her power comes from the fake mustache she wears as a symbol of authority.

weapon.name: Chistka
weapon.desc:
A pistol Cherino uses to purge dissenters.

Cherino simply aims the pistol and shouts, "Purge!" And just like that, it's done—without even pulling the trigger.

name: Yuzu
newQuote: P-Please don't come looking for me...
profile:
President of Millennium's Game Development Department.

Yuzu struggles with social anxiety and finds it difficult to deal with people, so she spends most of her time in a cabinet in the Game Development Department. Despite that, her passion for games is second to none. She loves both making and playing games.

weapon.name: Nyan's Dash
weapon.desc:
A grenade launcher used by Yuzu.

A clip of a cute cat running is constantly being played on the side of the weapon.

bondGear.name: 色褪せたCD
bondGear.desc:
ユズの名前が書かれたCD。
『テイルズ・サガ・クロニクル・プロトタイプ』が入ったマスターディスク。かつて、ユズはこれを目にするだけで辛い気持ちが蘇ったという。

name: Azusa
newQuote:
All is futile, and life has no meaning.
Though part of me wants to trust you.
profile:
The ice queen of Trinity's Make-Up Work Club.

After dropping out of school, she ended up at Trinity and is studying again. Despite being lonely, Azusa distances herself from others to avoid causing trouble—a source of concern for the other Make-Up Work Club members.

weapon.name: Et Omnia Vanitas
weapon.desc:
A gun cherished by Azusa.

The engraving on its barrel means, "Vanity of vanities: All is in vain".

name: Koharu
newQuote: Burn all the dirty stuff! Burn it!
profile:
A member of Trinity's Make-Up Work Club.

Koharu was originally part of the Justice Task Force, but she was forced to transfer to the Make-Up Work Club due to poor grades which put her at risk of flunking. A dunce who can't keep up with her classes despite thinking she's an elite student. Koharu reads racy material for fun, and gets dirty ideas from the most trivial things, which ends with her embarrassing herself.

weapon.name: Justice Black
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle used by Koharu.

It was named when Koharu was part of the Justice Task Force.

name: Azusa (Swimsuit)
newQuote: The beach... I'm still not used to it.
profile:
The Make-Up Work Club's ice queen visits the beach for the first time.

She tries to keep cool and calm as usual to not cause trouble for others, but her friends want to make sure she enjoys her first beach trip. This causes her to worry about what others might think of her; but from their perspective, she's just the usual Azusa.

weapon.name: Et Omnia Vanitas
weapon.desc:
Azusa's assault rifle.

It continuously shines brilliantly, unlike its bashful owner trying to hide her excitement for the beach.

name: Hina (Swimsuit)
newQuote: My duties don't change simply because it is summertime.
profile:
Gehenna Academy head prefect visiting the beach for summer boot camp.

She may be aloof about most things, but was convinced to visit the beach for training. She's rarely been to the beach, so her swimsuit and floats are a little dated. She's slightly embarrassed they still fit her. Regardless, she will not hesitate to enforce discipline even during the summer or against the raging sea.

weapon.name: Destroyer of Denouement
weapon.desc:
A multipurpose machine gun Hina wields as naturally as any limb.

 The weapon's ruthlessness is undeniable, even when its owner is taking a break from Gehenna at a beach.

bondGear.name: Prefect Team's Official Tube
bondGear.desc:
The Gehenna Prefect Team has deemed this tube its official club tube.
This special tube is made of top-of-the-line materials to ensure Hina's safety, who can't swim. You'll never see her in the water without it.

name: Iori (Swimsuit)
newQuote: There had better not be any fools caught up in breaking the rules.
profile:
A cold-blooded specialist of Gehenna's Prefect Team participating in summer boot camp.

Closely monitored Gehenna's troublemakers from getting out of line at the beach alongside other Prefect Team members. She's deeply disappointed that summer camp was ruined by the constant appearance of those fools, even if she tries to hide it.

weapon.name: Crack Shot
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle used by Iori to deal with fugitives.

Strengthened by adding a rifle grenade in the shape of a carbonated drink bottle.

bondGear.name: Soft Blanket
bondGear.desc: A blanket with Gehenna Academy's logo stitched into it. It's used for various purposes. Perhaps there's still a little bit of Iori's warmth left...

name: Shiroko (Cycling)
newQuote: Then, I'll talk to you later, Sensei.
profile:
The Foreclosure Task Force captain is earnestly training for summer.

She changed into her cycling jersey for some summer training, and is as usual, serious about completing her near-impossible trek across Kivotos.

weapon.name: White Fang 465
weapon.desc:
Shiroko's favorite assault rifle.

Various tune-ups and modifications have been made to better suit long-distance traveling.

name: Shun (Small)
newQuote: It's really convenient being this small again!
profile:
An instructor of the Plum Blossom Garden who drank Saya's elixir and transformed into her smaller self.

Even though her body is young, her mind is the same, so she tries to speak with maturity, but she sometimes gives in to her childlike instincts.

weapon.name: Whip of Love
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle inlaid with Shun's favorite pattern.

Its size has become cumbersome for Shun's much smaller frame.

bondGear.name: Shun's Childhood Memories
bondGear.desc: A pair of mother-of-pearl hairpins that Shun cherishes. Now that she's older, she rarely uses them because she doesn't wear pigtails very often. But they're a part of Shun's precious memories that never change.

name: Neru (Bunny)
newQuote: Seriously, this is not my cup of tea.
profile:
The president of C&C who changed into a bunny girl outfit for a special mission. 

It's not the kind of outfit Neru would normally wear, but she doesn't hesitate to wear it for a mission.
She is laying low and dialing down her usual temperament for the mission's sake, but she still won't give up her flashy bomber jacket.

weapon.name: Twin Dragons
weapon.desc:
The pair of SMGs used by Neru.

The chain connecting the two rattles splendidly as she runs.

name: Karin (Bunny)
newQuote: There's no mission I can't accomplish.
profile:
A C&C agent on the front lines.

She is focused only on accomplishing the mission without complaint or concern for her outfit.
Still, the longer-than-normal stares from others are a bit bothersome.

weapon.name: Big Eye
weapon.desc:
A massive sniper rifle used exclusively by Karin.

It's so accurate that one could shoot down a dashing rabbit with it.

name: Asuna (Bunny)
newQuote: Let's have fun again, Master!
profile:
An agent of C&C who changed into a bunny girl outfit to go undercover.

She remains highly energetic, unlike the other members even when wearing a bunny girl outfit instead of her usual maid uniform.
On the contrary, Asuna is enjoying the experiences she encounters in new places.

weapon.name: Surprise Party
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle used by Asuna.

Its name isn't really appropriate for undercover missions, but that hardly bothers Asuna.

bondGear.name: Rabbit Tail Grenade
bondGear.desc: A grenade in the shape of a rabbit tail that Asuna wears while wearing her bunny girl outfit. It looks harmless because it's fluffy, but it's just as destructive as any other grenade.

name: Natsu
newQuote: Have you ever thought about shortcakes, Sensei?
profile:
A member of the Trinity After-School Sweets Club, head troublemaker, and a self-proclaimed romantic.

Has a habit of being strangely philosophical and comparing everything to desserts, making people around her feel awkward. She claims she simply wants to share her romanticism with everyone. However, it's impossible to deny that Natsu may just be messing with everyone since her definition of "romance" is always changing.

weapon.name: Beyond Lumination
weapon.desc:
Natsu's submachine gun.

A weapon used as a last resort by the typically peaceful Natsu.

name: Chinatsu (Hot Spring)
newQuote: I want to take it...slow today.
profile:
The head of the Medical Committee who happens to visit the hot springs resort while on duty.

Chinatsu's problems don't stop even at the snowy hot springs resort—from ordering new medicine to the latest Hot Springs Development Department conspiracy. However, the scenery of the idyllic hot springs makes the weary Chinatsu a bit indolent.

weapon.name: Support Pointer
weapon.desc:
Chinatsu's favorite pistol.

Small and light, Chinatsu's pistol is easy to handle and very suitable for undercover missions in hot springs resorts.

name: Aru (New Year)
newQuote:
Heeheehee. This is the first commission of the year, right?
Okay, I'll give it my best.
profile:
The eternal boss of Problem Solver 68.

Aru spends a lot of money on getting her hair done and renting an outfit to wear to the New Year's event in the hopes that her fixer agency will prosper in the new year.Perhaps because she feels more confident than usual, she has been putting on the air of a dignified boss, walking and talking in a nonchalant and carefree way.

weapon.name: Wine Red Admire
weapon.desc:
A semi-automatic sniper rifle with an antique design cherished by Aru.

According to Aru, her hard-boiled nature culminates just as her years of experience do with the upcoming New Year.

name: Mutsuki (New Year)
newQuote: Heeheehee! Let's have a lot of fun this year, Sensei!
profile:
Problem Solver 68's resident go-getter and chief of staff.

She goes to the New Year event with Aru to celebrate the upcoming new year. Mutsuki puts more effort into dressing up nicely for New Year's, but it doesn't change how she laughs and thoroughly enjoys watching the troubles that arise from her evil deeds. This troublemaker enjoys the new year with Aru, who always seems to be in trouble for one reason or another.

weapon.name: Trick or Trick
weapon.desc:
A multipurpose machine gun that Mutsuki always carries.

Quietly kept in her bag as she celebrates New Year's. But, as Mutsuki always says with a smile, "I'm always up for a prank or two..."

name: Wakamo
newQuote: Oh... We meet at last. ♥
profile:
One of the Seven Prisoners that escaped the Corrections Bureau after being suspended from Allied Hyakkiyako Academy.

She is the feared Fox of Calamity due to her destructive ways. Her motives are a mystery, and there are several rumors surrounding the face under her mask. Some say there's a monstrous devil underneath, but it remains only a rumor.

weapon.name: Crimson Calamity
weapon.desc:
Wakamo's favorite rifle.

Contrary to its antique design, it's a terrifying gun that always smells like smoke and gunpowder. It's mainly used to take care of the obstacles that threaten Sensei's safety.

bondGear.name: Concealing Fox Mask
bondGear.desc: Wakamo's beloved fox mask. It was originally intended to hide the identity of its wearer, but now it hides much more than that. This is the perfect fashion piece for concealing a young girl's heart.

name: Mimori
newQuote:
I still have a long way to go...
but I'll show you the results of my training.
profile:
Hyakkiyako Academy Inner Discipline Club's kind vice president.

A popular girl because she always has a gentle smile and is kind to everyone. The childhood friend of Tsubaki, the president of the Inner Discipline Club. She joined the club to fulfill her dream of becoming an elegant lady like the ones in the shoujo manga she used to read when she was young. She continues to train diligently by cooking and cleaning to make her dream come true.

weapon.name: Soft Resolution
weapon.desc:
An automatic pistol that Mimori usually carries around.

She bought it when she first dreamed of becoming an elegant lady. She cherishes it, always having it by her side.

bondGear.name: Dreamy Cherry Blossom Apron
bondGear.desc: Mimori's cherry-blossom-colored apron. It's a good friend to have while cooking, cleaning, and doing one's household chores.

name: Ui
newQuote: P-Please, keep it down...
profile:
Trinity Library Committee's Director.

A girl said to love books more than people that especially likes old books that clearly have history. She normally spends her time cooped up in Trinity's old library, curating the ancient texts.

weapon.name: Volume Suppressor
weapon.desc: A silencer rifle that Ui takes out when she can't stand the noise around her anymore. It lives up to its name, and silences its targets swiftly and effectively.

name: Hinata
newQuote: Do you need help with something?
profile:
A hardworking and kindhearted girl affiliated with the Sisterhood.

In charge of caring for the Trinity Cathedral as she completes duties and remains polite to all. However, she often makes mistakes thanks to her clumsy disposition and lack of confidence. She always carries an installable grenade machine gun in her bag, but never seems to struggle with its weight.

weapon.name: Reverence
weapon.desc:
A pistol Hinata carries with her everywhere.

Normally used to help people out of a pinch, like picking a broken lock.

bondGear.name: Inventory Management Ledger
bondGear.desc:
An inventory management ledger for the Trinity Cathedral made and maintained by Hinata.
Inside is a meticulous list of where the cathedral's supplies are stored and how many are available. Since Hinata generally finds whatever items people need herself, only a handful of people know of the ledger's existence.

name: Marina
newQuote: Running away doesn't help one bit!
profile:
Chairwoman of the Security Committee in charge of Red Winter Academy's safety.

Though she's known as a cold-hearted disciplinarian, the truth is she just blindly follows President Cherino's orders. She likes the word "charge" and is the first to run off when a problem occurs within Red Winter Academy, but often loses her way due to her terrible sense of direction.

weapon.name: Gray Balalaika
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun with a drum magazine adored by Marina.

Can smash those that doubt the Red Winter Office's authority with alacrity.

name: Miyako
newQuote: RABBIT 1. Begin the Operation.
profile:
The leader of the RABBIT Squad at SRT Academy. Her call sign is "RABBIT 1."

Miyako originally registered for SRT Academy because of her deep admiration for its adherence to justice. When they suddenly closed down the academy, she was left homeless and camping out in a park with other RABBIT Squad members. She is to-the-point and rarely shows what she's thinking so can come off as uncaring, but has the kindest heart in the squad.

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 31 Submachine Gun
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun Miyako received from SRT Academy.
A highly reliable submachine gun, it can effectively annihilate enemies even in the most extreme situations.

bondGear.name: Threadbare Name Tag
bondGear.desc: Miyako's old nametag from when she was a trainee. It may be old and worn out, but it's a precious symbol of her dreams.

name: Miyu
newQuote: Th-This is RABBIT 4. D-Did you call...?
profile:
The sniper of SRT Academy's RABBIT Squad. Her call sign is "RABBIT 4."

Miyu entered SRT due to her natural sniping talent, but struggled with her meek and shy temperament. Just as she found a home in the academy, it closed down and she joined the rest of her squad camping out in the park. Her lack of presence makes her a great sniper, but sometimes even her allies forget she exists.

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 39 Rifle
weapon.desc:
A standard rifle Miyu received from SRT Academy.
Precisely designed for a powerful single shot, it has a very high accuracy.

bondGear.name: Sad Bunny Thermos
bondGear.desc: A compact thermos that Miyu always carries with her. Carefully stored in a pouch featuring a sad-faced bunny.

name: Tsukuyo
newQuote: I-I'm just a tall, good-for-nothing... But I want to do my best to help, Sensei!
profile:
A girl from the Hyakkiyako Ninjutsu Research Club.

Tsukuyo is insecure about her towering height, as she was teased relentlessly for it as a child. She is timid and has a hard time speaking up, but also determinedly follows her goals once she's made a decision. While she doesn't know much about ninjas, she does her best for Michiru and Izuna so she won't let them down.

weapon.name: Tsukuyo-Style Submachine Gun
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun cherished by Tsukuyo.

Tsukuyo isn't very familiar with guns, so Michiru and Izuna helped modify it bit by bit. She now considers it an irreplaceable precious treasure because of their efforts.

name: Misaki
newQuote: There is no answer in such a huge void. Nevertheless...
profile:
A member of the Arius Squad, she gives off a quiet, stand-offish impression.

Misaki has no interest in others' opinions or how they treat her. She can be reckless to a fault, and her wrists and neck are always covered with thick bandages.

weapon.name: Saint Predator
weapon.desc:
Misaki's favorite portable missile.

Once it reaches a certain altitude, it splits into several submunitions and causes a wide explosion on the ground.

bondGear.name: Wooden Statue
bondGear.desc: A crude statue that Saori carved with a knife as a child. It's so old that even Saori herself had almost forgotten that Misaki had it.

name: Atsuko
newQuote: I wish there were flowers on this path.
profile: A mysterious member of the Arius Squad who always wears a gas mask. Atsuko's mask isn't necessarily meant for disguise but rather a gas mask she wears for protection and safety. The squad leader, Saori, calls her Hime. Very little is known of who she is.

weapon.name: Scorpius
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun Atsuko uses.

It has strong firepower and a short barrel, making it suitable for close combat.

name: Wakamo (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Heeheehee! I came here to find you, darling! ♥
profile:
One of the Seven Prisoners. A girl who blooms like a colorful flower in summer.

She arrived on the beach in her swimsuit to show it off to Sensei and ended up with a huge smile on her face because she ran into Sensei just in time. Her passion toward Sensei is as strong as the summer sun. She always tries her best to get closer to them.

weapon.name: Crimson Calamity
weapon.desc:
Wakamo's favorite rifle.

To match Wakamo's fiery mood in the hot summer, its muzzle shoots out a crimson flame hotter than the sweltering summer heat at everything that gets in the way.

bondGear.name: Beautiful Floral Parasol
bondGear.desc: Wakamo's flashy parasol. It holds Wakamo's pure heart and her eternal affection for Sensei.

name: Nonomi (Swimsuit)
newQuote: During the summertime, it's best to go to the beach with friends!
profile:
An excitable member of the Abydos Foreclosure Task Force.

Always caring and kind, Nonomi looks after everyone, even when on vacation. She was so excited to head out to sea with others that she purchased one-too-many supplies, all out of her own pocket.

weapon.name: Mini No. 5
weapon.desc: A machine gun that protects Nonomi on her beach adventures. The bullets blow away targets along with the scorching heat.

name: Hoshino (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Come here, Sensei. It's really cool here.
profile: The Foreclosure Task Force president who flew to an uninhabited island to relax for summer. She always says she wants to sit around and do nothing, so she's perfectly prepared for summer. She's unaware that she looks a little more excited than usual.

weapon.name: Eye of Horus
weapon.desc: Hoshino brought this shotgun to the resort, modified for use at the summer sea. It's meant for various functionalities, like creating a path in the forest and chasing away bugs.

name: Izuna (Swimsuit)
hobbies: Studying the art of ninjutsu, serving her lord
newQuote: This summer I'm gonna train hard with my lord!
profile:
A member of the Hyakkiyako Academy Ninjutsu Research Club who went to the beach for summer training.

She's a ninja who's always very lively. These days, she's 200% more energetic than usual, probably because she loves the summer sun. To become a ninja who can endure the hot weather, Izuna is "training" with her lord, Sensei, but mostly just enjoying her summer.

weapon.name: Izuna-Style Super Ninja Tool
weapon.desc: Izuna's favorite submachine gun. It's a state-of-the-art ninja tool! It's fully waterproof, so there's no problem using it in the ocean. Izuna can even shoulder massage her lord with it.

name: Chise (Swimsuit)
newQuote: The ocean is full of interesting things!
profile: An airhead who's a member of the Yin-Yang Club. She likes to hang out in the sunlight. When she started wearing a swimsuit, her popularity skyrocketed and her following grew as strong as the summer sunshine. As expected, she doesn't seem to care about her popularity at all. Chise is spending a fulfilling summer with Sensei, looking for sparkles and poking turtles.

weapon.name: Type 575 Grenade Launcher
weapon.desc: Chise's favorite multi-grenade launcher. As part of a special summer collaboration, Chise engraved a haiku inspired by Sensei onto her ammo. It's a precious item unique to Chise, and it's not sold on the market.

bondGear.name: Treasure-Filled Pouch
bondGear.desc: A fancy bag that Chise takes to the beach. Kaho attached a name tag to make sure it doesn't get lost. Chise has filled the bag with countless keepsakes from the beach. Not all of them could fit, but the memories will still last forever.

name: Saori
newQuote: I'm still wandering the streets, but one day...
profile:
The leader of the Arius Squad, an elite special forces unit within the Arius Academy. 

She has a cold side where she uses any means or methods necessary to achieve her goal, but she is passionate and she expresses her emotions honestly. She's an unrivaled expert when it comes to guerrilla tactics, but she lacks common sense in everyday life. It's said that the Arius Squad's combat power is the result of completing Saori's training from start to finish.

weapon.name: Arius Assault Rifle
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle used by Saori.

Saori personally customized the item to make it more efficient. Once she aims its muzzle at her prey, they never escape.

bondGear.name: Saori's Mask
bondGear.desc: The mask that Saori always wears. You can feel its age, as well as affection from its owner, who's worn it through countless fights.

name: Kazusa
newQuote: Oh, Sensei. I didn't expect to see you here.
profile:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club with a relaxed and quiet personality. 
She usually keeps to herself and tends to just go along with the other members' shenanigans. She'll grumble a lot about their constant chaos, but she secretly loves that about her friends.

weapon.name: Mabinogion
weapon.desc: A machine gun Kazusa's had for a long time. When asked about the origin of its name, Kazusa gets embarrassed and avoids answering the question.

name: Kokona
newQuote: I'm Kokona of the Disciplinary Support Department's Plum Blossom Garden! N-No! I'm a full-fledged instructor!
profile:
A first-year student who serves as an instructor for the Shanhaijing Disciplinary Support Department's Plum Blossom Garden.
Although she should be in elementary school because of her age, she was recognized for her excellent learning ability and given the authority of an instructor. Her students often follow her around and call her by her name without her title, which she dislikes.

weapon.name: Lady's Elegance
weapon.desc: An assault rifle that's effective both in maintaining the dignity of a lady and fulfilling duties as an instructor.

name: Utaha (Cheer Squad)
newQuote: With burning passion!
profile:
The Engineering Department president dressed in a special cheer outfit for the sports festival.

Despite how abruptly she was assigned to the cheer squad, she is dedicated to ensuring that her passion won't be overshadowed by that of any other cheerleader. Still, that same passion sometimes burns a bit too bright, causing her to lose sight of her original goal...

weapon.name: Meister Zero
weapon.desc:
Utaha's reliable submachine gun of simple design.

It's stored inside Thundergun so that she resists the urge to use it as a pom-pom.

name: Noa
newQuote: Will you come away with me to the realm of reason?
profile:
Secretary for the Millennium School Student Council, Seminar.

Her main responsibility is to maintain Seminar's official records, but she also handles various other legal and administrative duties, such as overseeing patent applications and product evaluations for Millennium student creations. Her extraordinary memory allows her 
to almost perfectly remember anything she's read or heard once.

weapon.name: Secretary on Record
weapon.desc:
A pistol Noa modified with a conversion kit.

Extend the stock and hold down the trigger and voilà, it's basically an SMG.

name: Yuuka (Track)
newQuote: Perfectly prepared for this year's Kivotos Halo Festival!
profile:
The Seminar treasurer, changed into gym clothes to participate in the Kivotos Halo Festival.

Despite having already suffered from a heavy workload preparing for the big event, all she needed was a good night's rest to be back in tip-top condition. As a member of Seminar, Yuuka wants to focus on being a calm, rational representative of the council and ambassador to Kivotos, but the competitiveness of her fellow students is more infectious than she would ever admit.

weapon.name: Logic & Reason
weapon.desc:
A pair of machine guns used by Yuuka..

Yuuka is never without her logic or reason. Hopefully they won't weigh her down during the event...

name: Mari (Track)
newQuote: May we enter this field day as competitors and leave as friends...
profile:
A student from the Sisterhood. She's dressed in track clothes to participate in the Kivotos Halo Festival.

She eagerly volunteered for the Executive Committee, believing deeply in the festival's purpose: wishing for peace in Kivotos. However, the festival has been mired in trouble and conflict, and, due to her dedication, Mari has been caught up by it too.

weapon.name: Piety
weapon.desc:
A pistol carried by Mari.

It's usually used for peaceful purposes, such as to signal the start of a match. However, at times Mari finds it inadvertently pointed towards troublemaking students.

name: Shigure
newQuote: Do you need a place to warm up? Heehee... Just let me know.
profile:
A student suspended from Red Winter Academy and on probation in Former Institute 227.

She was suspended for mixing alcohol into the school-issued kompot. She's an old friend of Nodoka from Spec Ops No. 227. The rumor is that she caused trouble on purpose after Nodoka was sent to Former Institute 227 as punishment in order to join her friend. Whether or not this is true, she loves homemade kompot and always carries a flask in her pocket.

weapon.name: Spring Punch
weapon.desc:
A multi-grenade launcher that Shigure is never without.

Anyone hit by the grenades will be knocked senseless.

name: Serina (Christmas)
newQuote: The Remedial Knights are here to deliver Christmas cheer! Merry Christmas to all!
profile:
A member of the Trinity Remedial Knights. She's dressed in a Santa outfit to celebrate Christmas.

She's spending her Christmas volunteering for charity work. Anyone who watches her singing carols and giving out her handmade gifts would think that she was an angel who came down from heaven for Christmas.

weapon.name: Tactical Therapy
weapon.desc:
Serina's special assault rifle.

It doesn't fire needles, but it carries a double dose of Serina's love.

name: Haruna (New Year)
newQuote: What's more appetizing than seasonal food? For the New Year, we could have osechi, ozoni, oshiruko... Oh, now I'm hungry.
profile:
The president of the Gourmet Research Society, who got dressed up in a kimono for the New Year.

She believes all aspects of a situation are crucial for a gourmand: not just the time and place of the meal, but also wearing the appropriate outfit. Therefore, she has set out on the path of epicureanism wearing a kimono. She certainly seems elegant and refined, but...if she's served food that doesn't meet her standards, watch out.

weapon.name: Ideal
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle used by Haruna.

She will have no partner more suitable than this gun as she continues the path of a true gourmand.

name: Mine
newQuote: I'm Aomori Mine, Remedial Knights captain. Does anyone need medical assistance?
profile:
The captain of the Trinity Remedial Knights. A true knight in shining armor, she's upright and resolute, but she has a radical side as well.

She has a reputation in Trinity: Mine destroys things, and her knights pick up the pieces. She spends her spare time maintaining her equipment and making snacks and drinks for get-togethers with her friends. Some say that she knows as much about black tea as Hasumi of the Justice Task Force.

weapon.name: Proof of the Cure
weapon.desc:
Mine's shotgun.

She always says that there are two sides to a cure.
Is this weapon one of them?

name: Mika
newQuote: Thanks for waiting! It's my turn to jump in! ☆
profile:
The former leader of Pater, one of the allied factions that makes up Trinity General School.

A former Tea Party member and a childhood friend of Nagisa, another member of the Tea Party. When the two clash politically, she draws a clear line between their public disagreements and their private friendship.
She seems lively and cheerful, and she's never without a smile. However, her demeanor hides worries that she can't reveal, making her something of an enigma.

weapon.name: Quis ut Deus
weapon.desc:
Mika's favorite submachine gun.

It was originally an ordinary Trinity-made submachine gun before Mika decorated it with love. Now, it shines like a star in the dark sky. You can be sure it's had a role in everything Mika does.

name: Megu
newQuote: Is there a problem? Let me handle it!
profile:
The backbone of the Hot Springs Department and foreman at their construction sites.

She believes with all her heart that demolition can solve any problem.
Her personality is bold and confident, and she's earned the trust of everyone in the Hot Springs Department due to her excellent demolition skills.

weapon.name: Molten Meg-ma!
weapon.desc:
Megu's one-of-a-kind flamethrower. When she takes it out, it becomes like an extension of her.

No one else can handle it due to the immense amounts of heat it gives off. Its interesting name comes from a pun that someone made about her once.

name: Sakurako
newQuote: Through every trial you face, I'll watch over you.
profile:
The faithful head student of Trinity's Sisterhood.

Her sincerity shines through all her actions, making her trusted by many.
She'll take up any duty given to her with piety and serenity. However, when it comes to matters of fashion or everyday life, her traditional nature sometimes causes her trouble.

weapon.name: Purifying Touch
weapon.desc:
A gun that's maintained with all the thoroughness and reverence that Sakurako possesses.

Others find it difficult to even touch.

name: Toki
newQuote: Leave it to me. I'm both the perfect agent and the perfect maid.
profile:
The mysterious fifth agent of Millennium's secret spy agency, C&C.

Although she technically belongs to C&C, she's been Rio's exclusive maid and bodyguard for some time, so few know who Toki is. While she is a superior secret agent who's at ease with high-tech weaponry and technology, she seems to be a bit lonely as she always works solo.

weapon.name: Time of Secrecy
weapon.desc:
Toki's one-of-a-kind assault rifle.

With performance as exceptional as its appearance suggests, it can crush any obstacle and complete any mission. She didn't name it herself, but it's unknown who did.

bondGear.name: High-Performance Headset
bondGear.desc:
The perfect headset for maids and agents. It's noise-cancelling and has special technology for processing audio. It's even hackproof!
For Toki, it's an item that represents her relationship with someone very precious to her.

name: Koyuki
newQuote: When the plan falls apart, well... That's when life gets interesting!
profile:
A brilliant yet troublesome member of Millennium's Seminar.

She's completely unaware of her unrivaled talent for mathematical decryption. She always sets out to test her luck. Even if she goes too far and lands in hot water, she never stops.

weapon.name: Mulli-Gun
weapon.desc:
A machine gun that's been through the wringer alongside Koyuki.

Once, it was entirely submerged in seawater. During the repair process, its color changed. Other than that, it's still as sturdy as Koyuki, who never worries about such trivialities.

bondGear.name: Challenge Coin
bondGear.desc: A coin that Koyuki drilled a hole in. It was originally made so that she could play arcade machines for free, but it's now useless because of modern card readers.

name: Kayoko (New Year)
newQuote: I hope I find some good music this year.
profile:
Problem Solver 68's department head.

She dressed up for New Year's with the other members, and it's like she was born to wear the dress! She's obviously annoyed by all the commotion at the New Year's Eve event, but she'll always do her best to help out Problem Solver 68 with her brains and wit.

weapon.name: Demon's Roar
weapon.desc:
Kayoko always has this pistol by her side.

This pistol emits a tremendous roar with every shot. It's useful for not only taking care of rude clients, but also for chasing away bad luck in the new year.

name: Kaho
newQuote: Allow me to show you Hyakkiyako's impeccable charm, Sensei.
profile: Vice President of the Hyakkiyako Academy and the Lead Strategist for the Tourism and Culture Public Relations Support Team.A member of the Yin-Yang Club, she is in charge of Hyakkiyako's public relations and marketing. So, naturally, she's an avid fan of all things Hyakkiyako and cares deeply about the students who work together to build the culture she loves. Some students even whisper that Kaho feels more like the president than their actual president. In a pool of eccentric Yin-Yang Club members, she's the only one with a healthy amount of common sense, and that alone makes her an invaluable part of the team.

weapon.name: The Lead Strategist's Expertise
weapon.desc:
Kaho is never seen without her rifle.

This rifle was custom designed with one purpose in mind: promoting Hyakkiyako's unique style and culture. Although it's made for publicity, it still packs a punch when putting troublemakers back in line.

bondGear.name: Students' Certificate of Appreciation
bondGear.desc: A certificate of appreciation from Hyakkiyako students, presented to Kaho and carefully preserved in a frame.

name: Aris (Maid)
newQuote: Bum bum bum! I am now Aris the hero, maid edition!
profile:
A member of the Millennium Game Development Department. She's wearing a maid uniform after being mistaken for a C&C member.

The maid uniform is a little different from what she'd usually wear, but she's determined to get used to it. A bright and cheerful honorary maid, Aris gives everything she has to complete her assigned missions.

weapon.name: Supernova: The Sword of Light
weapon.desc:
Aris' railgun.

She takes advantage of its sheer output and firepower to snipe any enemy that stands in her way. She has one mission in mind: to utterly crush her target!

bondGear.name: Maid Headband
bondGear.desc: It seems that a mop, a maid uniform, and a maid headband are the three marks of a Hero Maid. Of these, Aris considers the headband the most essential.

name: Toki (Bunny)
newQuote: I am ready to commence operation at anytime. ...Is there a problem with my outfit?
profile:
A dedicated C&C agent, Toki changed into a bunny costume to better camouflage her in infiltration operations.

Her specialty under Rio was never infiltrations, so she's a little nervous about these new types of missions. But regardless, she's excited to finally follow in the footsteps of her C&C upperclassmen, no matter how much she tries to hide it.

weapon.name: Time of Secrecy
weapon.desc:
Toki's exclusive assault rifle.

Whether it's a standard mission or a top-secret operation, she'll dominate the field with her weapon.

name: Reisa
newQuote: The ace, hero, arbitrator, knight, and star. I am...Uzawa Reisa!
profile:
A member of the Vigilante Crew who tends to show up suddenly and unannounced.

Reisa is rambunctious and loud, so much so that she's often taken for a joke. But there's no one more passionate about Vigilante Crew activities than she is. She likes to make an entrance when she bursts on to the scene, and is always testing out different heroic introductions.

weapon.name: Shooting☆Star
weapon.desc:
Reisa's precious shotgun.

It's immediately obvious whose weapon this is with the carefully customized gun barrel. She may be small and cute, but her experience defending justice in Trinity makes her just as fierce!

name: Rumi
newQuote: Is anyone hungry?
profile:
President of the Black Tortoise Promenade, a food district in Shanhaijing Academy.

Possessing exceptional operational skills, Rumi has grown the Black Tortoise Promenade from a run-of-the-mill food alley into one of the most sought-after food districts in Kivotos. This has made her a thorn in the side of the Shanhaijing Student Council, who is wary of the growth of independent factions. Rumi denies this and claims she isn't interested in anything other than cooking and advancing the promenade.

weapon.name: Learn the Old, Know the New
weapon.desc:
Rumi's favorite submachine gun.

Named after an old idiom that goes, "learn from the old to know the new." Rumi has always seemed more interested in the "new" aspect.

name: Mina
newQuote:
One must fight their own battles.
No good comes from involving others.
profile:
Executive Officer of Genryumon, Shanhaijing's student council, and the Student Council President's personal bodyguard.

Despite her calm and collected demeanor, she's a hardcore classic noir movie buff. She likes to quote scenes and lines from movies, although often incorrectly. She gets into trouble trying to be cool at inappropriate times, but Genryumon members do their best to mitigate the damage.

weapon.name: Wise Dragon, White Tiger
weapon.desc:
Mina's beloved two-handed pistols.

The White Tiger in her right hand and the Wise Dragon in her left, she affectionally calls these two her true comrades-in-arms. Perhaps emotion and reason can work in tandem at times.

name: Miyako (Swimsuit)
newQuote: This is RABBIT 1. We've just arrived at the ocean.
profile:
The RABBIT Squad leader, who has come to a remote fishing village on an undercover operation.

She has come to the seaside town disguised as a tourist to investigate the boxed lunches distributed to convenience stores.
With the hostile reactions from the residents and the fishy smell wafting through town, it's not exactly a tourist's dream. But still, she can't resist dressing for the beach with a cute swimsuit!

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 31 Submachine Gun
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun Miyako received from the SRT Academy.
It's incredibly reliable and can operate effectively in hot and humid environments.

name: Saki (Swimsuit)
newQuote:
This is RABBIT 2.
Commencing undercover operation.
profile:
The RABBIT Squad's point woman, who is visiting a remote fishing village on an undercover operation.

Always focused on doing things by-the-book, Saki has come with a bag packed with everything needed for a mission, including her manuals. Despite being in a swimsuit, her work ethic remains the same.

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 26 Machine Gun
weapon.desc:
Standard machine gun issued to Saki from SRT Academy.

It frequently malfunctions in humid environments like the beach, because it's vulnerable to rusting. This isn't a problem to Saki though, who diligently cleans her guns with every use.

name: Ui (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Ugh. Ugh... Grr... This darn...
profile:
The president of the Trinity Library Committee. She's investigating the ruins as part of a deal with the Sisterhood.

She doesn't enjoy the outdoors much, but she's taking the investigation seriously, as she has a passion for ancient manuscripts, ruins, and artifacts.

weapon.name: Volume Suppressor
weapon.desc:
Ui's silenced rifle.

Even though she's on a deserted island, it's seen quite a bit of use.

name: Hanako (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Oh... I'm soaked... ♥
profile:
A young lady from the Make-Up Work Club who's come to the island for the summer.

Her outfit is unconventional, perhaps because she's comfortable with the people she's with. In spite of appearances, she has an honest, sincere side.

weapon.name: Honest Wish
weapon.desc:
Hanako packed this assault rifle for the beach.

She acts like the name has a hidden meaning...

name: Meru
newQuote: Get up... It's time...to draw...
profile:
A member of the Knowledge Liberation Front, a book club at Red Winter Academy.

 Unlike her club mate Momiji, she doesn't just read fan books—she creates them. Writing under the name "Meruri," she draws inspiration from the drama between her fellow students. Even the feud between the Trinity and Gehenna student bodies have made it into her pages, generating some notoriety outside of Red Winter Academy.

weapon.name: Creative...Anguish!
weapon.desc:
A pistol specially crafted for Meru.

Its name is a bit on-the-nose, but she couldn't think of anything better...

name: Kotori (Cheer Squad)
newQuote: Knowledge is always useful, no matter where you are!
profile:
This member of the Engineering Department donned a cheerleading outfit to support her friends.

Her cheers are loud, upbeat, and—most importantly—filled with technical explanations.

weapon.name: Professor K
weapon.desc:
Kotori's machine gun, also known as EX-Plain.

She has made simple yet sensible (?) modifications for field day.

name: Ichika
hobbies: Helping others and trying new things
newQuote: Oh? It's not time for us to meet yet, is it? Were you waiting?
profile:
A member of the Justice Task Force with a relaxed demeanor.

As a member of the task force, she excels at promoting cooperation and coordination. She's even on good terms with the students of the other academies. While she is known for her easy-going demeanor and friendliness, these traits don't come naturally to her and require a lot of work.

weapon.name: Red Dragon
weapon.desc:
Ichika and this assault rifle have been together through thick and thin.

Despite its unassuming appearance, it is capable of unleashing intense power.

name: Kasumi
newQuote: Have I ever told you the true meaning of hot spring development?
profile:
The president of the Gehenna Hot Springs Department.

Her mission in life is to develop hot springs wherever there is geothermal activity, and she doesn't care what's in the way. She enjoys the unanimous support of her club members, but outside of her club she is a wanted criminal.

weapon.name: Red Rector
weapon.desc:
Kasumi is never without this handgun.

She mostly fires it into the air in order to spice things up. Despite its small, cute design, it's actually very powerful...and loud.

name: Misaka Mikoto
newQuote: This place is seriously busy.
profile:
A student at Tokiwadai Middle School.

Misaka is one of the seven Level 5 espers in Academy City, a place populated by students with supernatural abilities. As an Electromaster, she has the power to manipulate powerful currents of electricity, but she has had difficulty using this power since arriving in Kivotos. She is easy to talk to and has a kind heart, so she tends to get along with others. She's also a fan of a cartoon frog from her world called Gekota.

weapon.name: Gunbolt
weapon.desc:
A specialized firearm made for Misaka Mikoto by the Engineering Department.

Its special features were designed to make use of the user's electrical abilities.

name: Shokuhou Misaki
newQuote: Hmmm... What to do? And what's the story here?
profile:
A spirited student from Tokiwadai Middle School.

As one of only seven Level 5 espers in Academy City, she leads the largest faction at Tokiwadai Middle School. Her ability, Mental Out, lets her manipulate the minds of those around her, though she's had trouble using this ability since arriving in Kivotos. She has something of a rivalry with fellow Level 5 esper Misaka Mikoto, who also happens to be immune to her influence.

weapon.name: Mental Pointer
weapon.desc:
An exclusive firearm made for Shokuhou Misaki by the Engineering Department.

This pretty pistol is a perfect fashion accessory.

name: Yukari
newQuote: It's time! Here I come!
profile:
A first-year member of Hyakkiyako's Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council.

Despite being a descendant of the historic Kadenokouji family, she admired the Hyakkaryouran and joined them instead of following her duties. She has a strong sense of pride in being a member, and nothing can stop her from doing all she can to serve the council. It's not an easy path, but she's strong and easily brushes things off. She really looks up to the upperclassmen of Hyakkaryouran, especially Nagusa.

weapon.name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - A Girl's Determination
weapon.desc:
Yukari's standard-issue Hyakkaryouran rifle.

These standard rifles were objects of admiration for her back in middle school. Finally owning one is proof of how hard she's worked to achieve her dream. She's known for her limitless determination.

name: Renge
newQuote: We're the authors of my youth, Sensei!
profile:
The Assault Squad Captain of Hyakkiyako Academy's Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council.

Renge has a strong sense of justice and duty. She is often called Hyakkaryouran's Disciplinarian because of her strict teaching methods. She is soft-hearted and cares deeply for her underclassmen. She's always taken pride in her Hyakkaryouran responsibilities and has cherished every moment with the club. However, Renge sometimes regrets watching her youth pass her by while she was immersed in her duties. She's passionate about training and marksmanship, but is an idealist who dreams of a life like the ones she sees in mangas and movies.

weapon.name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Blazing Youth
weapon.desc:
Renge's favorite rifle.

A ceremonial Hyakkaryouran rifle, modified to fit her unique style. It's a trusty companion that's never failed her. Paired with her excellent marksmanship, she's a deadly threat in battle.

bondGear.name: White Ribbon of Youth
bondGear.desc: The ribbon used by the protagonist of Renge's favorite coming-of-age novel. It carries Renge's wish for a similar life.

name: Kikyou
hobbies: Spinning yarn, reading military history, sunbathing
newQuote:
You won't regret standing by my side.
I'll prove my worth.
profile:
Operations Officer of Hyakkiyako Academy's Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council.

Kikyou values logic and reason above all else. This combined with her deep loyalty to the Hyakkaryouran can make her a terrifying foe to face. She may be the mastermind behind all Hyakkaryouran strategy and operations, but she would never sacrifice an ally's safety for a victory. To her, there are only enemies or allies. Her ruthlessness terrifies her foes, while her kindness endears her to her fellow club members.

weapon.name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Keen Wisdom
weapon.desc:
A rifle Kikyou is never seen without.

As operations officer of the Hyakkaryouran, she's rarely on the front lines. But when she is, her smarts and this trusty weapon always lead her to victory.

name: Kotama (Camp)
newQuote: I've been waiting to hear your footsteps come closer, Sensei.
profile:
Veritas' surveillance expert dressed for cold weather.

Kotama was resistant to Chihiro's demands that the Veritas members experience the outdoors at first, but she's excited for the chance to record the many sounds of nature. She really enjoys the different ambiences she's found during the trip, but the sound of Sensei's voice is still her favorite.

weapon.name: Echo Link
weapon.desc:
A pistol that Kotama always has tucked away into her belt.

She's modified the silencers to make firing a bullet so quiet she won't disturb the wildlife.

name: Hare (Camp)
newQuote: A can of Frenzy MAX should always be enjoyed cold!
profile:
This Veritas member is bundled up to withstand the winter's cold.

Hare can't remember the last time she's left the confines of her desk, and she can't help but be a little nervous at a campsite with no Wi-Fi. While she's accepted losing most of her creature comforts, she draws the line at no cans of Frenzy MAX.

weapon.name: Auto Aimer
weapon.desc:
Hare's bullpup assault rifle.

It's been modded for the outdoors with various new features: ignition for starting a campfire and an automatic bear-targeting feature. It couldn't account for user panic when Hare actually encountered a bear, however.

name: Hina (Dress)
newQuote: All my efforts are yours.
profile:
The Head Prefect of the Gehenna Academy sporting a beautiful dress for the upcoming party.

This is the type of event she'd usually think of as a bother, but the promise of Sensei's presence at Gehenna's party has piqued her interest. She might not even be aware of the enthusiasm oozing out of her as she diligently practices her piano solo.

weapon.name: Destroyer of Denouement
weapon.desc:
A multipurpose machine gun Hina wields as naturally as any limb.

It's a merciless weapon built for punishing wrongdoers. But this time, Hina handles it with self-discipline and gentle compassion for someone else's sake.

name: Ako (Dress)
newQuote: I won't allow a single mistake on our mission!
profile:
Senior administrator of the Gehenna Prefect Team and secretary to Head Prefect Hina.

She's dressed up in bold formal wear for the upcoming party to stand proudly by Hina's side. Ako's well-known and admired for her impeccable attention to detail and competency, but she's upping the ante this time to become the perfect agent.

weapon.name: Hot Shot
weapon.desc:
Ako's pistol.

It's been designed to perfectly fit Ako's skill set, this time with an emphasis on her secret role as Gehenna's special agent.

name: Kayoko (Dress)
newQuote: I'm worried...but it's all right. Everything will be fine.
profile:
The department head of Problem Solver 68 who infiltrated the Opera House.

Although she claims her attire is unfamiliar, there's no hint of awkwardness. She calmly completes her task regardless of the crowd's gaze.

weapon.name: Demon's Roar
weapon.desc:
A pistol Kayoko always carries with her.

Equipped with a silencer, it's very practical, especially for covert infiltrations.

name: Aru (Dress)
newQuote: Finally, the day has come. Enjoy the show.
profile:
The boss of Problem Solver 68, now entrusted with a covert commission.

Though this attire is not her usual style of clothing, her disguise is perfect at first glance. She hides her delight at receiving a rare hard-boiled assignment behind a poker face.

weapon.name: Wine Red/Admire
weapon.desc:
Aru's semi-automatic sniper rifle and a constant companion even during special missions.

Its design complements her look even in the most elegant places.

name: Umika
newQuote: I heard there was a festival going on and came to check it out! Oh...was I misinformed?
profile:
A first-year Festival Operations Department member.

Raised in the countryside, she has a deep love of city festivals. She's practically a festival encyclopedia and lists off trivia whenever she opens her mouth. She occasionally needs a reminder that silence is golden.

weapon.name: Festival Fever
weapon.desc:
Umika's beloved assault rifle.

She claims it's the perfect festival accessory, great for announcing the start of the festivities or resolving any minor disputes that arise during the event.

bondGear.name: Old Festival Doll
bondGear.desc: A doll that Umika bought at her first festival. It came as a pair.

name: Kazusa (Band)
newQuote: Every day is unique. I never grow tired of it all.
profile:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club and the lead vocalist and bassist of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

Accidentally became the lead vocalist by way of an offhand remark, then refused to let herself back down from it. She seems accustomed to the chaos of the music scene now, and accepts it with ease.

weapon.name: Mabinogion
weapon.desc:
A machine gun that's making history with Kazusa.

It's also the closest witness to all of Kazusa's various guises.

name: Yoshimi (Band)
newQuote:
Pay attention!
 There won't be a second time!
profile:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club, and the guitarist of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

Although she started on a whim, she believes in doing things right. She also handles the band's visuals, including icons, symbols, and outfits.

weapon.name: Sweet Driver
weapon.desc:
Yoshimi's assault rifle, which is always by her side.

 It's typically used as her weapon of choice in dessert competitions. It fires shots as lively as the notes from her guitar.

name: Kirara
newQuote: What excitement is waiting for me today?
profile:
A cheerful high school girl attending Gehenna Academy.

 She's always eager for thrilling new experiences, and has a friendly personality that allows her to interact with new people as if they were long-time friends.

weapon.name: Chocolate & Strawberry
weapon.desc:
The gun that Kirara always carries.

 Styled to her liking, it looks more like a fashion accessory than a firearm. The name comes from Kirara's favorite type of crepe.

name: Momoi (Maid)
newQuote: I'm the best maid! Let's play some games first, Sensei!
profile:
Scenario writer for the Game Development Department at Millennium.

She ended up putting on a maid uniform after being mistaken for a C&C member. Before she can clear up the misunderstanding, she somehow gets thrown into incident after incident... But she overcomes all these hardships with her uniquely bright and confident attitude.

weapon.name: Unique Idea
weapon.desc:
Momoi's rifle.

While she's not even sure why herself, she claims that every maid needs a rifle.

name: Midori (Maid)
newQuote: If I have to, I can be the perfect maid. Please look forward to it, Master.
profile:
Illustrator for the Game Development Department at Millennium Science School, currently in disguise as a C&C member.

Despite claiming that she wore the maid uniform entirely against her will, since the situation is what it is, she treats her duty with diligence.

weapon.name: Fresh Inspiration
weapon.desc:
Midori's rifle.

She claims she has to carry the perfect gun to become the perfect maid.

name: Kanna (Swimsuit)
newQuote: In case of an emergency, contact me immediately. I'll be there in a flash.
profile:
Director of the Public Peace Bureau at the Valkyrie Police School, dispatched as a lifeguard.

Her quick judgment, situational awareness, and swimming skills are all above average, but her distinctively fierce appearance makes public interactions challenging.

weapon.name: Valkyrie Service Pistol No.17
weapon.desc: Kanna's service pistol from the Valkyrie Police School. It has been carefully waterproofed for field use.

name: Moe (Swimsuit)
newQuote: RABBIT 3, reporting for duty. So, when can we launch the missiles?
profile:
The RABBIT Squad's operator, who's visiting a remote fishing village for an infiltration mission.

She's...very eager to test out a variety of weapons in a new, unfamiliar environment. Unlike the other squad members, she's wearing a provocative swimsuit, which she insists contributes to the operation's destructiveness.

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 224 Pistol
weapon.desc:
Moe's service pistol from the SRT Academy.

Its frame is constructed from a sturdy molybdenum alloy, enabling rapid firing even in hot and humid coastal conditions.

name: Hoshino (Armed)
newQuote: This old timer's going to take it a bit more seriously now. Heh, it's a bit embarrassing, though.
profile:
The Abydos Student Council vice president, as well as the president of the Foreclosure Task Force.

Equipped with the military gear she's been keeping in reserve, she is well prepared for a battle in this form. She's still the same person, but now her serious side has come out.

weapon.name: Eye of Horus
weapon.desc:
Hoshino's favorite shotgun, with a simple design.

It serves as the core of Hoshino's armament system.

name: Hoshino (Armed)
newQuote: This old timer's going to take it a bit more seriously now. Heh, it's a bit embarrassing, though.
profile:
The Abydos Student Council vice president, as well as the president of the Foreclosure Task Force.

Equipped with the military gear she's been keeping in reserve, she is well prepared for a battle in this form. She's still the same person, but now her serious side has come out.

weapon.name: Eye of Horus + Backup Pistol
weapon.desc:
The combination of Hoshino's usual shotgun and a pistol she cherished.

They are used to aggressively break through the enemy defenses.

name: Shiroko*Terror
newQuote: Probably... I'll be fine as well.
profile:
A version of Shiroko from another world, who came to this place with Phrenapates.

She's the same person in a sense, but with an older aura. Just like Shiroko, she'll do whatever it takes, no matter how outlandish the idea, for the sake of revitalizing her academy and district.

weapon.name: Black Fang 465
weapon.desc:
Shiroko's favorite assault rifle.

Well used, and the marks of its many repairs are plain to see, but because of that diligent maintenance, it still works perfectly.

name: Saori (Swimsuit)
newQuote: What's our next mission?
profile:
The leader of the Arius Squad, Saori is on a long search for her purpose in life.

She has little life experience and a lot to learn, but her strong personal code and sense of diligence help her gain new experiences through part-time work.

weapon.name: Arius Assault Rifle
weapon.desc:
Saori's assault rifle.

Well maintained, and always up to the job, whether on or off the clock.

name: Hiyori (Swimsuit)
newQuote: I-Is it here? The Beach Festival...?!
profile:
An Arius Squad member who came to the beach to have fun.

An avid magazine reader, she has some secondhand knowledge of beaches and festivals, but because of her unique quirks, she can't fully enjoy being there.

weapon.name: Identity
weapon.desc:
A massive sniper rifle Hiyori uses.

Although it ended up aiming at the prize instead of the enemy, its accuracy is still on point.

name: Marina (Qipao)
newQuote: Uh... I-Is it fine? Even if I'm in this outfit?
profile:
Marina dressed up in a qipao for the exchange event with Shanhaijing.

She's thoroughly enjoying her role in the exchange by fawning over pandas, acknowledging Shanhaijing's hospitality, and so on.
While she seems a bit flustered by the completely different style of outfit compared to Red Winter, others seem to appreciate it.

weapon.name: Gray Balalaika
weapon.desc:
Marina's favorite SMG.

No matter the place or the outfit, she'll take down those who question the authority of Red Winter Office, without a second thought.

name: Reijo
hobbies: Kung fu training, eating tasty food
newQuote: By any chance, are you interested in kung fu or martial arts?
profile:
Manager of the main restaurant of the Black Tortoise Promenade, the merchant alliance club of Shanhaijing. She is also the Promenade president's personal bodyguard.

As a huge kung fu fan, she'll imitate the actions or words of famous martial artists, whenever the situation allows it. Unlike her cool and composed appearance, she often conducts herself with a fiery passion.

weapon.name: Clear Mirror, Serene Water
weapon.desc:
Reijo's automatic rifle.

She's modified the gun to achieve the perfect harmony of guns and fists. Her endless training has...somewhat improved her shooting skills.

name: Mari (Pop Idol)
newQuote: Actually... I've always admired them. Idols.
profile:
The leader of Trinity's idol group, Antique Seraphim.

She originally undertook this endeavor to support everyone else, but she eventually blossomed into the role with grace and beauty. Even before she donned the costume, her determination to work hard for others' happiness qualified her to be an idol.

weapon.name: Piety
weapon.desc:
The pistol Mari carries around, even after she becomes an idol.

Its unique design pairs perfectly with her idol costume, as if they were made to be used together.

name: Sakurako (Pop Idol)
newQuote: At last, all will know.
profile:
A member of Trinity's idol group, Antique Seraphim.

She volunteered for the idol event in hopes of clearing up any misunderstandings revolving around the Sisterhood and to improve its reputation. Despite her worries, she is widely loved and receives much support from within the Sisterhood.

weapon.name: Purifying Touch
weapon.desc:
Unlike her change to an idol costume, her gun remains the same.

It is a symbol of Sakurako's steadfast will.

name: Chiaki
newQuote: Look here! One, two, cheese!
profile:
The bright and cheerful secretary of the "Weekly Pandemonium Society."

One of her greatest interests is her publishing her magazine, "Weekly Pandemonium Society." She works hard to spread the news of the Pandemonium Society's activities and, more importantly, Ibuki's cuteness to the student body.

weapon.name: Camera Blitz
weapon.desc:
Chiaki's rifle.

Its muzzle flash is big and bright due to its modded flash suppressor.

name: Yuuka (Pajamas)
newQuote: An excellent accountant is always ready for a good night's sleep!
profile: Seminar's accountant, sporting her pajamas to enjoy a leisurely rest. She always performs her duties perfectly and on time. However, constant issues at school, in conjunction with her chronic insomnia, has made it difficult for her to get rest. She's equipped herself with a fluffy pillow and soft, well-fitted pajamas to achieve the perfect rest, but the mischievous members of Millennium, who seem to have little regard for daytime or nighttime, seem determined to disturb her peace.

weapon.name: Logic & Reason
weapon.desc: Two submachine guns belonging to Yuuka. Even these two firearms, representing her logic and reason, are not able to chase away her chronic insomnia.

name: Noa (Pajamas)
newQuote: Darkness has no color...
profile: Seminar's secretary, who's put on pajamas to enjoy a cozy rest. This secretary's holidays are usually quiet, as she tends to operate in solitude. However, the moments she spends with other Seminar members are the exception. No matter how ridiculous the commotions and misunderstandings her adorable underclassmen and warm-hearted colleagues cause, Noa silently watches and records the scenes, always accompanied by a light smile.

weapon.name: Secretary on Record
weapon.desc: A pistol equipped with Noa's conversion kit. This multi-use pistol is perfect for both weighing down papers and late-night reading, Noa's favorite pastime.

name: Seia
newQuote: Like this, all roads connect to one.
profile:
A member of the Tea Party, from Trinity General School, and leader of Sanctus.

Others find her pedantic and unpredictable. A bit capricious and impulsive, rather like a noble. Following her recovery from an assassination attempt, she's shown more of her stubborn and childish side.

weapon.name: Keen Illumination
weapon.desc:
Seia's favorite pistol.

It has an elegant and stable design, as expected of a Tea Party member. It's always loaded, just like Seia, who's not hesitant to spit harsh words when the situation calls for it.

name: Neru (School)
newQuote: I really can't get used to this.
profile:
The leader of C&C. She took off her bomber jacket to do her job as the Millennium Expo's guide.

Normally, she'd never have done that, but she's a sucker for those who ask nicely. Her primary job is to give directions and maintain security, but she also has another hidden mission.

weapon.name: Twin Dragons
weapon.desc: Neru's dual SMGs. Her outfit may be different, but her guns are just as flashy as before.

name: Asuna (School)
newQuote: Let's do lots of fun things!
profile:
A C&C Agent deployed to help facilitate the Millennium Expo.

Having changed into a school uniform, she works as both an event guide and a security officer. Her unpredictable actions and unique, cheerful personality make her very popular as a guide.

weapon.name: Surprise Party
weapon.desc:
Asuna's assault rifle.

The name is quite lively, though unrelated to the mission.

name: Sena (Casual)
newQuote: Reporting that I am off duty today.
profile:
Sena chose this casual outfit for her day off.

Even when she's off duty, she does not forget about her mission as the president of Medical Emergency Club. However, she secretly hopes for a change of pace. Gehenna's Medical Emergency Club president expresses her curiosity with a lighter mood than usual.

weapon.name: Portable Emergency Kit
weapon.desc:
Sena's compact grenade launcher.

Even on its days off, its functionality remains unchanged.

name: Juri (Part-Timer)
newQuote: I started working part-time!
profile:
Juri changed into her uniform as a cafe part timer.

Surprisingly, she seemingly succeeded in cooking a dish she'd been hoping to perfect...but in the end, she was faced with the same result as always. Regardless, she's truly happy to have succeeded at cooking, even temporarily, and continues to practice and work hard.

weapon.name: Lunch Club Defense Gun Type B
weapon.desc:
Juri's shotgun.

Whether for the School Lunch Club or part-time activities, it's a necessity...or at least that's what she claims.

name: Rei
newQuote: Practice like it's a real game, play like it's practice!
profile:
Millennium Baseball Club's cleanup hitter.

She has a bold dream of reforming the Millennium Baseball Club, which is better defined as a physics dynamics club than an actual baseball club. Her alliance with Sumire is a strange one, considering Sumire's boundless energy. They do end up having quite a few disagreements when in the game, however.

weapon.name: Moon Shot!
weapon.desc:
Rei's recoilless launcher. Its bullets are imbued with her fervent desire to hit a home run.

One day, she'll land a hit that makes it to the moon and back.

name: Saori (Dress)
newQuote: N-No problem. If it's for the job...
profile:
The leader of Arius Squad. She ended up having to wear a dress for a job.

Despite originally wearing her dress for professional reasons, she seems to have truly taken a liking to it. She doesn't seem to recognize her natural inclinations for fashion.

weapon.name: Arius Assault Rifle
weapon.desc:
Saori's assault rifle.

She might have changed up her look, but her trusty rifle will never change.

name: Hikari
hobbies: Practicing bizarre driving skills, observing ants
newQuote: Player Hikari appears.
profile:
An officer of Highlander Railroad Academy's Central Control Center.

She and her twin sister, Nozomi, were selected for their genius talent in locomotive driving skills, but she's a total flop when it comes to paperwork or administrative work. Her tendency to follow her desires and do things at her own pace, with little regard for others' opinions, causes all sorts of trouble.

weapon.name: Ticket Punch
weapon.desc:
Hikari's pistol is perfect for dealing with rude passengers.

Surprisingly, the gun seems to be very well maintained.

name: Nozomi
newQuote: Pahyahyahya! Were you waiting for me?
profile:
An officer of Highlander Railroad Academy's Central Control Center.
