She has a bright and cheery personality but a total disregard for fastidiousness or attention to detail. She and her twin sister, Hikari, cause all kinds of havoc. She tends to follow the call of her own desires, but her responsible side takes the stage when she's operating trains.

weapon.name: Dead Girl's Switch
weapon.desc:
Nozomi's pistol.

Although she rarely finds opportunity to use it, it's always well maintained. That way, she can quickly eliminate any hindrances that dare to interfere with her train's operations.

name: Nagusa
newQuote: I await the day when hundreds of flower species bloom in tandem.
profile:
A member of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council, who gives off a mysterious aura.

Although she was only the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council's vice president, Nagusa received the Authority of the Presidency, the Hundred Lotus, when former president Ayame disappeared. Despite being an indecisive person, riddled with fears and insecurities, she continues to put one foot in front of the other for the sake of those she holds dear.

weapon.name: Hundred Lotus
weapon.desc:
An old rifle that exudes a sense of power.

It's the proof of the Authority of the Presidency, passed down by the Great Prophet Kuzunoha. Only the rightful successor of the Hyakkaryouran is able to wield the Hundred Lotus.

name: Natsu (Band)
newQuote: Ah... Let us walk the path of ROCK together.
profile:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club and the drummer and schedule manager of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

She enjoys philosophizing on the meaning of "rock," but she never fully defines it. Because, of course, it is not "rock" to explain.

weapon.name: Beyond Lumination
weapon.desc:
Natsu's submachine gun.

A weapon used as a last resort by the typically peaceful Natsu, because sometimes the world demands action, not contemplation. Its bullets fire with a rhythmic cadence, much like a drumbeat.

name: Yukari (Swimsuit)
newQuote: I'll shall be perfectly perfect, even at the beach!
profile:
A member of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council who is ready for the summer!

She's thrilled to be attending the Hyakkiyako Water Festival with her favorite seniors. Even at the beach, her boundless energy and bright personality shine through.

weapon.name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - A Girl's Determination
weapon.desc:
Yukari's standard-issue Hyakkaryouran rifle.

It's her most precious possession, so she's thoroughly waterproofed it.

name: Mika (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Wow. Did I keep you waiting? ☆
profile:
The Tea Party member who planned the beach vacation.

She started it out of consideration for her friends, but it feels like things are getting more and more complicated. Lately, she's been so stressed out that she can barely sleep.

weapon.name: Quis ut Deus
weapon.desc:
Mika's favorite submachine gun.

Thanks to her meticulous care, it gleams brightly even at the beach.

name: Seia (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Heehee. My appearance isn't the only thing that has changed.
profile:
A member of the Tea Party and the leader of Sanctus, now on a leisurely summer vacation. 

 With her capricious and impulsive nature, she's had no problem detaching herself from her Tea Party responsibilities and entering full vacation mode. While she's always been a little unpredictable, she's no longer restraining herself and is eager to let loose.

weapon.name: Keen Illumination
weapon.desc:
Seia's favorite pistol.

While her outfit may be lighter, her words and bullets are as harsh as ever. Her fighting technique is as bold as her swimwear.

name: Hasumi (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Isn't this too cute for me...?
profile:
The vice president of the Justice Task Force who's escorting the Tea Party on their beach trip.

She's delighted to be at the beach, but is retaining her professional composure. Perhaps she's having the best time on this vacation. Thanks to her incredible self-discipline, she doesn't have to worry about how she looks in her swimsuit...probably.

weapon.name: Impalement
weapon.desc:
Hasumi's favorite sniper rifle.

The always-shining barrel reflects her brilliant and vigilant mind.

name: Eri
newQuote: Nyuhuhu, are you in need of my magic?
profile:
The president of Occult Society, with a passionate interest in the study of the occult in art.

She's known for her prominent witch hat and her ability to bring magic into any conversation. She firmly believes that she can use arcane arts to improve her poor grades.

weapon.name: Arcane Magic Wand
weapon.desc:
A rifle that Eri claims is a magic wand.

Perhaps the two are similar in that they can both shoot flames and make things disappear.

name: Kanoe
newQuote: I've been watching you...since my previous life...
profile:
A member of the Occult Society who specializes in exploring how the occult impacts art.

Despite being the only third-year in the Occult Society, she is happy supporting her other members in more of an assistant role. Due to her unusual appearance and actions, a rumor has it that she is...a bit supernatural herself.

weapon.name: Trismegistus
weapon.desc:
Kanoe's favorite shotgun.

It fires rounds by creating a chemical reaction via alchemy...or so she claims.

name: Miyo
newQuote: Could I...also become a romance novel writer?
profile:
An art student from Wildhunt Art Academy.

She is the president of the Free Trade Cartel, an unofficial, illegal smuggling club. Although her ultimate goal is the dissolution of the Free Trade Cartel, that day is likely very, very far off. Her shy personality tends to be dwarfed by her over-the-top club members who never do things halfway.

weapon.name: Kivotos Typewriter
weapon.desc: A rifle that Miyo always carries around, but rarely gathers the nerve to actually use. Instead, she uses it as a means to engrave text she calls "bullet marks."

name: Fuyu
newQuote: Anything in particular you're looking for?
profile:
Sales Manager for the Free Trade Cartel, an unofficial, illegal smuggling club.

She works as the face of the Free Trade Cartel, receiving orders and meeting with their clients. Although she always acts confident and composed, she actually breaks down quite quickly if a plan starts to go awry.

weapon.name: Gentle Suggestion
weapon.desc:
A suspicious machine pistol from an unknown manufacturer that Fuyu uses.

It doesn't take long for a client to agree with whatever Fuyu is saying whenever she pulls this out.

name: Suzumi (Magical)
newQuote:
せ、先生……！
こ、この格好は……その……違うんです！
profile:
トリニティ総合学園所属、自警団の潜入任務を遂行すべく、魔法少女のコスチュームを着ることになった少女。

魔法少女モノに疎く、あまりコスチュームへの理解が深くない。人前に立つのも苦手ではあるが、持ち前の誠実さで逆境に立ち向かうと決めている。

weapon.name: セーフティー
weapon.desc:
スズミが持っているアサルトライフル。

潜入任務のために可愛く飾られている。スズミにとっての大切なパートナー。

name: Subaru
newQuote: アリウスへようこそ。
profile:
アリウス分校所属、アリウスに残っている生徒たちを導いている少女。

優しく、誰にでも親切で人当たりが良い。後輩からの信頼も厚い。後輩のためであれば、いつでも容赦なく引き金を引く覚悟ができている。

weapon.name: Anomoios
weapon.desc:
スバルが使用するアサルトライフル。

機能面を考慮し、スバル自身でカスタムした銃。一見して、大きな差は無いように見えるが、細かいこだわりが随所に見受けられる。

name: Takane
hobbies: 読書、写真撮影、アイスホッケー観戦
newQuote:
ごきげんよう。
オススメの作品があるのですが、読んでみませんか？
profile:
レッドウィンター連邦学園所属、出版部の部員。

上品で優雅、礼節を重んじるお嬢様。評論家としての腕前はたしかだが、主観が強すぎてトラブルに発展することもしばしば。「知識解放戦線」とはライバル関係にある模様。

weapon.name: シュヴィーブジク
weapon.desc:
タカネがデコレーションした拳銃。

戦闘に用いるだけでなく、タカネ自身の怒りの表現にも使われることがあるのだとか……。

name: Tsukuyo (Dress)
hobbies: 身代わりの術、息を潜めること
newQuote: わ、私が本当にモデルを……？
profile:
百鬼夜行連合学院所属、忍術研究部の部員。

ファッションショーの警備員として雇われたものの、モデルとしてデビューすることに。コンプレックスだった身長がモデル業界では大きな強みとなった。本人としてはモデルと部活の両立に悩んでいる模様。

weapon.name: ツクヨ流サブマシンガン
weapon.desc:
ツクヨが大事にしているサブマシンガン。

舞台上に持っていく時も特別飾ったりはしていない。以前、ミチルとイズナに飾りつけてもらった姿が、ツクヨにとって最高の状態だからなのだろう。

name: Rio (Armed)
newQuote:
電子戦なら任せてちょうだい。
最も合理的な解を見せてあげる。
profile:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、生徒会「セミナー」の会長。

未曾有の危機に対応すべく特殊スーツを身に纏った。後方支援から現場対応まで可能な合理を追求したスーツとなっている。

weapon.name: 立案者
weapon.desc:
リオの護身用拳銃。

特殊スーツのサポート性能によって、より正確な射撃が可能となった模様。

name: Aris (Armed)
newQuote: アリス、もっと世界を見てみたいです！
profile:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、ゲーム開発部の部員。

ゲームが大好きで、少し変わったところのある少女。今は世界の運命を背負っている。

weapon.name: 光の剣：スーパーノヴァ for アビ・エシュフ
weapon.desc:
レールガンを軽量化し、連続射撃が可能なようにカスタマイズされたアサルトライフル。

伝説の剣を手にすることで、少女は勇者となった。そう、アリスの冒険もここから始まったのだ。

name: Kei
hobbies: アリスのお世話、おしゃれ、ゲーム（本人は否定）
newQuote:
な、なんですか……？
何かあるなら言ってくださいよ！
profile:
新たな身体となったケイ。

普段よりもややテンションが高くなっているが、本人は自覚していない模様。

weapon.name: ルミナス・ノヴァ
weapon.desc:
ケイ専用のレールガン。

新たな一歩を踏み出した彼女に相応しい逸品となっている。

name: Eimi (Armed)
hobbies: ボーっとすること、音楽鑑賞
newQuote: 和泉元エイミ、現場から報告。
profile:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、特異現象捜査部のスペシャリスト。

マークスマンとして後方支援をすべく着替えている。できるだけ肌の露出を抑えた方が支援に適していると思ったものの……暑さに耐えられなかったのか、ケープを脱いで腰に巻いている。

トキと同様メインの武器をエネルギーライフルに変更した。狙撃サポート用のバイザーを装着しているため、バックパックもトキのものより遥かに大型のものとなっているのだとか。

weapon.name: マルチサポート
weapon.desc:
新しく作られたエイミのエネルギーライフル。

後方支援のために用意された、スペシャリスト用の武器だ。

name: Akane
profile: An agent of C&C, a secret organization of the Millennium School. Akane operates under the call sign Zero-Three. She became known as the Master Cleaner for her modus operandi of infiltrating the enemy camp and clearing it out with explosives, all while wearing her signature gentle smile.

weapon.name: Silent Solution
weapon.desc:
A pistol that Akane always carries with her.

It contrasts with the explosives she usually uses, AKA the "Noisy Solution".

name: Chise
profile:
A spacey girl who is a member of the Hyakkiyako Academy's Yin-Yang Club.

Extremely fond of traditional activities such as writing haiku, which led her to join the Yin-Yang Club. Her exotic looks and presence have made her the envy of her peers at Hyakkiyako, but she seems completely oblivious to that fact.

weapon.name: Type 575 Grenade Launcher
weapon.desc:
A multiple grenade launcher owned by Chise.

Each shell has a haiku that Chise painstakingly wrote.
It is currently on sale at the Yin-Yang Club.

bondGear.name: The Sound of the Incoming Wind
bondGear.desc: Chise's favorite kind of wind chime. Its clear, crisp sound is said to signal the arrival of a cool breeze.

name: Akari
profile:
A member of the Gehenna Gourmet Research Society.

Don't let her charming appearance fool you. A glutton with a massive appetite, she's the reigning champion of various competitive eating contests across Kivotos. She possesses a mild-mannered and kind personality, but she can prank as well as any other student at Gehenna Academy.

weapon.name: Mark of Gluttony
weapon.desc:
Akari's favorite assault rifle.

This greedy glutton's assault rifle has various firearm accessories, including a grenade launcher.

name: Hasumi
profile:
The second-in-command of Trinity's Justice Task Force.

Hasumi also acts as the task force's tactical commander on behalf of the wild and ferocious club president, Tsurugi. She may seem like any other ordinary Trinity student, but make no mistake, she's a Justice Task Force member through and through. At times she'll do incredibly reckless things with absolute calm.

weapon.name: Impalement
weapon.desc:
Hasumi's favorite sniper rifle.

Its sleek, old-fashioned appearance and fierce power are not unlike its owner.

bondGear.name: Frayed Justice Task Force Book
bondGear.desc: A notebook worn out from long and extensive use. It has club members' preferences and strengths written in detail. Perhaps her constant attention and observation are her primary ways of expressing affection.

name: Nonomi
newQuote: Finally, it's time for me to make my move!
profile:
A member of the Abydos Foreclosure Task Force.

A friendly, pleasant girl that provides the Foreclosure Task Force with much-needed emotional support to balance out the extreme personalities of its other members. Though she doesn't show it, she comes from a wealthy family and pays for nearly all of the Foreclosure Task Force's snacks out of her own pocket.

weapon.name: Mini No. 5
weapon.desc:
A machine gun used by Nonomi.

Contrary to its name, Mini No. 5 is anything but light.

bondGear.name: Secret Bucket List
bondGear.desc: A secret list of Nonomi's dreams. It's filled with things she hopes to do with members of the Foreclosure Task Force someday.

name: Kayoko
profile:
The department head of Problem Solver 68.

Often mistaken for a rough-and-tumble delinquent due to her naturally intimidating appearance, but unlike the rest of Problem Solver 68, she holds no ill will toward anyone. Kayoko opts not to say anything about these misunderstandings, but this only adds to the perception that she's someone to be feared.

weapon.name: Demon's Roar
weapon.desc:
A handgun that Kayoko always carries.

Kayoko uses a silencer when indoors as it makes a loud roaring noise every time it's fired.

name: Mutsuki
profile:
Problem Solver 68's resident go-getter and chief of staff.

Unlike Aru, who has a semblance of a conscience, Mutsuki is a devilish troublemaker who relishes in committing acts of mayhem. As one of her oldest friends, Mutsuki understands Aru's bravado best, even if she doesn't exactly always play along.

weapon.name: Trick or Trick
weapon.desc:
A multipurpose machine gun that Mutsuki always carries.

Firepower is an important component of fun pranks according to Mutsuki.

name: Junko
profile:
Resident glutton of the Gehenna Gourmet Research Society.

Though Junko's more of a conventional gastronome compared to the other binge-eating, frankenfood-gobbling members of the Gourmet Research Society, she still goes hog wild when presented with a scrumptious delicacy.

weapon.name: Diner's Outlaw
weapon.desc:
A pair of machine guns used by Junko.

Junko can take over the dining table anytime and anywhere as long as she has these machine guns with their incredible rate of fire.

bondGear.name: Food Tour Notepad
bondGear.desc: A notepad used by Junko. It's a special journal in which she records the scores of every great restaurant she has been to, organized by area.

name: Serika
profile:
The conscientious treasurer of the Abydos Foreclosure Task Force.

Serika nags a lot and does not hesitate to let her opinions be known. Despite her habit of bashing the academy, saying, "To hell with this academy!" she is secretly quite devoted to it and even works part-time jobs to try and help pay off the academy's debts.

weapon.name: Sincerity
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle that Serika carries with her whenever she goes to work part time.

Always carefully maintained, revealing Serika's meticulousness and sincerity.

bondGear.name: Serika's Sports Bag
bondGear.desc: Serika's black sports bag. This versatile accessory is great for school, working out, and more... It can carry just about anything.

name: Tsubaki
profile:
President of Hyakkiyako Academy's Inner Discipline Club.

Her motivation for training regularly is to attain "a more comfortable and restful sleep." Thanks to her diligent training, she is able to sleep while sitting, standing, or even while eating. Her prowess earned her the nickname "Sleeping Beauty." Though she seems to be constantly on the verge of nodding off, at night she takes to the streets to keep them safe.

weapon.name: Sleeping Companion Ⅱ
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun used by Tsubaki.

Tsubaki chose a smaller model to prevent it from interfering with her daily training.
For reference, Sleeping Companion I is a pillow inside her shield.

name: Yuuka
profile:
The treasurer of Seminar, the student council of Millennium Science School.

Yuuka has a mathematical acumen that is notable even among Millennium's high ratio of STEM students. She oversees the entirety of Millennium's budget. Her special talent is the abacus, and she has a habit of fiddling with the beads when dealing with emotional or mental conflicts.

weapon.name: Logic & Reason
weapon.desc:
A pair of machine guns used by Yuuka.

They help Yuuka make rational and intelligent decisions.

bondGear.name: Yuuka's Scientific Calculator
bondGear.desc: A scientific calculator Yuuka is never seen without. Despite her excellent mental arithmetic skills, Yuuka always double checks her calculations to ensure perfection.

name: Momoi
profile:
Scenario writer of the Game Development Department at the Millennium School.

Both Momoi and her twin sister, Midori, develop games with the Game Development Department. Though her lighthearted and cheerful personality previously put her at odds with her more introverted little sister, the two are now inseparable thanks to their shared love of video games.

weapon.name: Unique Idea
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle used by Momoi.

Fitted with an accessory gifted from her little sister, which Momoi fidgets with in a pinch. It always seems to help spark an idea.

bondGear.name: Old Game Console
bondGear.desc: The first handheld game console that Momoi bought with her sister. It seems that Momoi's "Gamer's Operation" was successful...

name: Kirino
profile:
A passionate cadet of Valkyrie Police School's Public Safety Bureau.

She enrolled in Valkyrie Police School because of her admiration for the upperclassmen, but was transferred to the Public Safety Bureau due to her poor marksmanship. However, she still works hard and dreams of becoming an officer who can gloriously subdue criminals.

weapon.name: Valkyrie Service Pistol No.3
weapon.desc:
A standard-issue pistol Kirino received from Valkyrie Police School.

Kirino often blames this pistol for her poor shooting skills.

name: Momiji
profile:
A literature enthusiast fighting to preserve knowledge in Red Winter Academy's library.

Most of her peers fight for bread and snacks, but she fights for books. Unfortunately, she's a serious otaku, which means that the Secrateriat rejects most of her requests to get more manga in the library... But does Momiji give up? Never!

weapon.name: Library Rule #7
weapon.desc:
Momiji's RPG.

Treat your library books with respect and Momiji will never have to invoke this "rule"...

bondGear.name: Limited Reprint Collection
bondGear.desc: A limited reprint of a manga collection. Even when everyone disagrees, if it's important to one person, then it's an important item.

name: Renge (Swimsuit)
profile:
The Assault Squad Captain of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council, now suited up for the summer.

She's entered the Hyakkiyako Water Festival to relish her youth with her friends. Her blazing passion and competitive spirit make her a force to be reckoned with.

weapon.name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Blazing Youth
weapon.desc:
Renge's favorite rifle.

With a trusty companion like this, winning the festival is a sure thing.

name: Haruka
profile:
A senior member of Problem Solver 68.

Her gloomy personality has made her the target of bullies since childhood. Only recently was Aru able to help her put a stop to the harassment. Since then, she has been the youngest senior member of Problem Solver 68. She may be timid and have painfully low self-esteem, but may also be the most terrifying member of her club because of her ideas alone.

weapon.name: Blow Away
weapon.desc:
A shotgun Haruka uses to exterminate pests.

Or uses to exterminate "pest-like things".

name: Asuna
profile:
An agent of C&C, a secret organization of the Millennium School.

Armed with brutal instinct and intuition, Asuna is a seasoned veteran who has successfully overcome countless challenges under the call sign Zero-One. She is also something of a loose cannon, doing things such as revealing her identity on secret missions and smashing anything that looks suspicious without a second thought. However, she always manages to produce great results in the end.

weapon.name: Surprise Party
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle used by Asuna.

The name suggests lively gatherings, but as usual, she can't remember where it came from.

name: Kotori
profile:
Member of the Engineering Department at Millennium Science School.

A chatterbox who loves discussing topics such as physics and mechanics. She's always the first one at the scene to explain what's happening whenever there's a machinery-related problem at Millennium.

weapon.name: Professor K
weapon.desc:
A machine gun Kotori carries. Also known as EX-Plain.

When asked about its name, Kotori begins by talking about the history of firearm development.

bondGear.name: Teardrop Glasses
bondGear.desc:
A pair of special glasses that Kotori always wears.
It's easy to look at them and say they're "weird-looking," but they're actually an expression of Kotori's compassion for those who sit through her long lectures.

name: Suzumi
profile:
A member of the Vigilante Crew responsible for protecting Trinity's students.

To combat the increasing number of attacks on Trinity's students at the hands of the other academies, Suzumi volunteered to patrol the streets to abate attackers. Often misunderstood as cold and unfeeling due to her strong sense of justice, she actually has a friendly side as well.

weapon.name: Safety
weapon.desc:
Suzumi's assault rifle.

A precious companion for Suzumi, who always patrols the neighborhood alone.

bondGear.name: Patrol Headphones
bondGear.desc: The headphones Suzumi carries on patrol. Calling them "Patrol Headphones" is a bit self-indulgent as they are a relatively common product.

name: Pina
profile:
A devout vigilante admirer attending Hyakkiyako Academy.

Pina has a bubbly, energetic personality and takes pleasure in helping others. Everything she knows about vigilantes comes from movies, so the accuracy of said knowledge can be somewhat dubious. Nonetheless, she persists in her ambition of becoming a vigilante herself.

weapon.name: Indiscriminate Shooter
weapon.desc:
Pina's stationary machine gun.

The non-stop heat it emits is as fiery as Pina's own heart.

name: Tsurugi (Swimsuit)
profile:
Trinity's Justice Task Force's president comes to the beach in pursuit of the romance of youth.

She tries her best to suppress her violent temperament famous for being Trinity's secret weapon and enjoy her youth on vacation...but the beach didn't pan out the way she wanted.

weapon.name: Blood 'n' Gunpowder
weapon.desc:
Two shotguns used by Tsurugi.

Can still fire without issue even after being submerged underwater.

name: Izumi (Swimsuit)
profile:
A Gehenna Gourmet Research Society member with a gluttonous appetite even during the summer.

She visits the beach with a watermelon in one hand and an ice cooler in the other in search of renown summer delicacies: Chocolate-flavored grilled unagi, spicy shaved ice, watermelon sprinkled with mint chocolate, and more. Her pursuit of various delicacies in Kivotos are second to none as her peculiar excursions continue even on the hot summer beach.

weapon.name: Daily Cutlery
weapon.desc:
A heavy machine gun used by Izumi.

Even now, Izumi's gun burns in search of a gourmet summer experience! It's even complete with waterproof functionality!

bondGear.name: Midsummer Ice Cooler
bondGear.desc: Izumi stuffed this cooler full of fruit, drinks, and secret spices—a perfect treat for midsummer relaxation.

name: Tomoe
profile:
The chief secretary of the Red Winter Office and President Cherino's closest aide.

A speaking master who can wrap up and deliver just about any message. She gives regular speeches at the academy to inspire loyalty to President Cherino. Cherino believes Tomoe is loyal because she is smitten by her charisma, but in fact, Tomoe simply finds Cherino adorable.

weapon.name: Vernost
weapon.desc:
A long sniper rifle used by Tomoe.

Equipped with a high-res telescopic sight making it possible to spot targets from afar and dispose of any insubordinate who doubts the authority of President Cherino.

name: Fubuki
profile:
A laid-back administrative advisor of Valkyrie Police School.

She entered Valkyrie longing for a laid-back, easygoing life as a civil servant. She remains negligent, enjoying life as it is without being swayed by money or fame even when a case is sent to the Public Safety Bureau. Her favorite activity is eating donuts while listening to the radio.

weapon.name: Valkyrie Standard Rifle No. 14
weapon.desc:
A standard rifle that Fubuki received from Valkyrie Police School.

It's pretty powerful, but it doesn't function properly because Fubuki has neglected to take care of it.

name: Michiru
profile:
The president of the Hyakkiyako Academy Ninjutsu Research Club and admin of the video channel Michiruchi, a Girl's Ninja Scroll.

Michiru tends to operate from a place of complete, unfounded confidence. As a ninja otaku, she works tirelessly with the other members to make ninjas popular throughout Kivotos. Her dreams are to make the Ninjutsu Research Club officially recognized and to reach 100 subscribers on her video channel.

weapon.name: Michiru-Style Overflow Shotgun
weapon.desc:
Michiru's favorite shotgun.

It's been modified in different ways, like putting an additional shotgun part under the muzzle so she could use ninjutsu bullets she made herself. Michiru says these are amalgams of her aspiration.

bondGear.name: 大事なビデオテープ
bondGear.desc:
年季の入ったビデオテープ。
ミチルを忍者の道に導いた映像が残されているとのことだが……。

name: Hibiki (Cheer Squad)
profile:
A member of the Engineering Department who puts on a cheerleader outfit for game days.

Hibiki's sewing skills are sharp thanks to her love of cosplay, so she designs and makes special event outfits for all the members of the Engineering Department. She made this particular cheerleader outfit a long time ago, so it seems to be a bit small in some places.

weapon.name: Fancy Light
weapon.desc:
Hibiki's favorite mortar.

When she's cheering, she puts it in a caddie to make it easier to carry.

name: Hasumi (Track)
profile:
Vice president of the Justice Task Force. She's wearing track clothes to participate in the Kivotos Halo Festival.

She joined the Executive Committee in place of Tsurugi, who's inexperienced with administrative work. Hasumi is trying to do her best and stay composed despite the president's excitement, but between troublemaking students and the smell of sweets coming from street vendors, distractions are everywhere.

weapon.name: Impalement
weapon.desc:
Hasumi's favorite sniper rifle.

Her gun sparks with the brightest fire when she's punishing injustice, even during the Kivotos Halo Festival.

name: Junko (New Year)
profile:
Junko is wearing a kimono for the new year.

She went through the trouble of putting on a new outfit, and has been looking forward to New Year's food. Once she starts eating, she won't tolerate interruption.

weapon.name: Diner's Outlaw
weapon.desc:
Two assault rifles wielded by Junko.

They punish anyone who dares to get in the way of their owner's enjoyment of gourmet food.

name: Koharu (Swimsuit)
profile:
A member of the Make-Up Work Club who's come to spy on Sensei.

While she feels a sense of duty to keep an eye on things, she's not unhappy that she's basically on vacation.

weapon.name: Justice Black
weapon.desc:
Koharu's sniper rifle has been modified for an island environment.

It's surprisingly well protected against humidity and salt.

name: Ibuki
profile:
A member of the Pandemonium Society and a mascot of sorts.

Despite being an elementary school student at Gehenna, she was recognized for her smarts and abilities and invited to the esteemed Pandemonium Society. She's the youngest member of the club and is excessively doted on by her seniors. In return, Ibuki does her utmost to not be a burden to her fellow club members and follows directions as best she can.

weapon.name: Yay, Bang Bang!
weapon.desc:
Ibuki's favorite firearm.

It was originally just a ceremonial rifle given to her by the Pandemonium Society, but she quickly made it her own by decorating it with her favorite stickers and accessories. It's one of her most prized possessions.

name: Airi (Band)
hobbies: Checking out dessert shops, tea parties
profile:
A member of the After-School Sweets Club and the leader of the hastily formed band Sugar Rush.

Determined to change her unassuming personality, she led the group into participating in the band event. Little does she know, she's the glue that keeps everyone together.

weapon.name: Sweet Dessert
weapon.desc:
Airi's favorite machine gun.

Its unchanged appearance serves as a reminder of something Airi herself almost forgot.

name: Mine (Pop Idol)
profile:
A member of Trinity's idol group, Antique Seraphim.

She volunteered for this idol event in order to become more personable as the captain of the Remedial Knights. While her unique righteousness remains the same, she has come to an honest realization about herself: Mine loves cute things.

weapon.name: Proof of the Cure
weapon.desc:
Mine's favorite shotgun.

Just as idol activities are extension of Remedial Knights activities, this gun can be seen as an idol's prop.

name: Aoba
profile:
Engineer from Highlander Railroad Academy's Freight Logistics Department.

She's very shy and introverted but surprisingly has quite the sharp tongue. But it's easy to miss her malevolent messages because of her tendency to mutter them under her breath. She's always suffering from heavy workloads and unfair treatment, so there is no end to her many complaints.

weapon.name: Hasty Expectations
weapon.desc:
Aoba's shotgun.

Its name really captures her motto, "Have no expectations." It's well-suited for blasting almost anything out of her way.

name: Rabu
hobbies: ヘルメット拭き、自販機の下を漁ること
profile:
ジャブジャブヘルメット団の隊長。

部下からの信頼も厚く、姉御肌。ただ、運だけはあまり良くない模様。

weapon.name: ピンチヒッター
weapon.desc:
ラブのショットガン。

バットのように使われることが多いものの、丁寧に手入れされている。

name: Toki (Armed)
hobbies: 配信視聴（仮）、ゲーム（仮）、漫画（仮）
profile:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、C&Cのエージェント兼、特異現象捜査部の現場担当。

偵察任務のために着替えた姿。本人曰く、「機動力に優れた新生・飛鳥馬トキ」とのこと。また、仮ではあるが趣味を見つけることができた模様。

weapon.name: サーチ＆リコン
weapon.desc:
トキ専用のエネルギーピストル。

本人曰く、コンセプトと雰囲気を一新したとのこと。これも新生・飛鳥馬トキの必須アイテムなのだろう。

name: Hibiki
newQuote: Have anything that needs fixing?
profile:
Member of the Engineering Department at Millennium Science School.

Socially inept and inarticulate compared to other students, but is a prolific inventor due to her innate talent for engineering. Her inventions are considered to be flawless masterpieces, but they often come equipped with baffling and obscure functions.

weapon.name: Fancy Light
weapon.desc:
Hibiki's favorite mortar.

For experiments, she uses it to fire other random things that aren't shells.

bondGear.name: A Meister's Goggles
bondGear.desc: Hibiki's exclusive goggles, with countless customization options. Besides their features, she likes the way they look.

name: Karin
newQuote: As you wish, Master.
profile:
An agent of C&C, a secret organization from Millennium Science School.

She's in charge of providing rear fire support under the call sign Zero-Two. Despite her intimidating appearance, she is the most cautious of C&C's agents and often ends up having to reel in Asuna and Akane when they get out of control during missions.

weapon.name: Big Eye
weapon.desc:
A massive sniper rifle used exclusively by Karin.

She can even accurately shoot down flying targets with it.

name: Saya
newQuote: Leave the experiments to me!
profile:
A genius inventor of Shanhaijing Academy.

A prodigy who earned six degrees while still in elementary school. However, she's known more for the way she causes trouble for others through her unruly antics than for her genius. She's always accompanied by her rat, Nezusuke, whom she's known since childhood and regards as family.

weapon.name: The Great I's Pistol
weapon.desc:
A custom-made pistol that Saya modified herself.

It is also often used to give shots to Nezusuke.

name: Mashiro
newQuote: Where do you need justice dispensed?
profile:
A devoted member of Trinity General School's Justice Task Force.

Armed with a massive sniper rifle that towers over her, Mashiro stoically provides fire support. Though not much one for words, she isn't shy or socially inept and actually becomes quite talkative when it comes to justice.

weapon.name: Manifestation of Justice
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle that Mashiro uses to carry out her duties in the Justice Task Force.

Although it's a bit bulky to carry around, Mashiro claims it doesn't deter her faith in justice.

bondGear.name: Learning Idioms and Proverbs Through Stories
bondGear.desc:
A set of books that explain the meanings of various idioms and proverbs through old tales.
It fits Mashiro's tastes perfectly.

name: Mashiro (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Justice doesn't back down, even in sweltering heat!
profile:
A devoted Justice Task Force member who escorted Tsurugi to the beach.

Mashiro does not stop training while other students go out to play and make summer memories. She believes that this is the way of justice.

weapon.name: Manifestation of Justice
weapon.desc:
A sniper rifle that Mashiro uses to carry out her duties in the Justice Task Force.

Duty to justice continues even on the beach.

name: Hifumi (Swimsuit)
hobbies: Peroro merch, shopping, listening to others
newQuote: Ahaha... It's a bit embarrassing having such a plain swimsuit.
profile:
A friendly Trinity Make-Up Work Club member visiting the beach with her friend.

She secretly borrowed a Crusader tank for a friend who had never been to the beach. Unfortunately, the Justice Task Force found out and she got in deep trouble. She happily rides the borrowed tank, just as clumsily as ever.

weapon.name: My Necessity
weapon.desc:
A pink rifle carried around by Hifumi.

This firearm with cute engravings is a must-have for beach vacations.

bondGear.name: Momo Friends Teapot: Tank Edition
bondGear.desc:
Hifumi's special Peroro teapot. She swears its necessary equipment for the beach.
This limited-edition teapot was made to look like a tank...for some reason. Hifumi apparently saved up for this item for a long time.

name: Saya (Casual)
newQuote: Even a genius like me needs some time off. Hahaha...
profile:
The genius inventor of Shanhaijing on a day off from her busy life.

Contrary to her usual days of being confined to the lab and devoting herself solely to researching new elixirs, Saya is active enough to ride a skateboard and roam around the streets during her days off. However, her constant intellectual curiosity for exploring new things remains the same even when she's taking it easy.

weapon.name: The Great I's Pistol
weapon.desc:
A custom-made pistol that Saya modified herself.

Its pink slide makes it a stylish accessory even on days off.

bondGear.name: Saya's Skateboard
bondGear.desc: Saya's decorated skateboard. It allows the free use of both hands, unlike bicycles or scooters, but also requires a certain level of skill.

name: Hatsune Miku
newQuote: Please listen to my song!
profile:
A virtual idol with a cheerful personality who loves to sing.

Originally, she only existed virtually online with no physical body, but she came to exist in the real world just in time for her live performance with the help of Kivotos' technology. She has quite a few hidden fans in Kivotos due to her ability to sing across time and space.

weapon.name: Concert T-Shirt Cannon
weapon.desc:
A gigantic t-shirt gun Miku uses to launch merchandise into the crowd at concerts.

There are diodes and other things embedded in the surface, and they sparkle beautifully with her music.

name: Ako
newQuote: There will be no mistakes as long as I'm here!
profile:
Senior administrator of the Gehenna Prefect Team and secretary to the head prefect, Hina.

Ako is always by Hina's side, assisting her. At first glance, she appears to be kind and good-natured, but she ruthlessly suppresses rule-breakers, showing no mercy. The students of Gehenna often call her "Hina's pet," but she doesn't seem to mind.

weapon.name: Hot Shot
weapon.desc:
A pistol used by Ako.

This pistol was awarded to Ako for reaching the position of senior administrator with painstaking effort. She always carries it with her and takes very good care of it.

name: Cherino (Hot Spring)
hobbies: Doling out demerits, purges, snowball fights
newQuote: Kneel before the magnificence of Purginator No. 1!
profile:
The president of Red Winter Federal Academy who came to Hot Springs Resort No. 227 to enjoy a vacation.

At first, she was planning to demolish the resort that Spec Ops built without her permission, but satisfied with the hospitality of Nodoka and the Spec Ops students, she's decided to extend her stay indefinitely. She doesn't really enjoy getting into the hot springs despite how much she likes resting at the resort and eating its food.

weapon.name: Chistka
weapon.desc:
A pistol Cherino uses to purge dissenters.

Tomoe modified some of its materials to prevent it from rusting, even in high temperature and humidity.

bondGear.name: Bath Assistant
bondGear.desc:
A souvenir from Red Winter Academy, carefully handmade by gluing a mustache onto a mass-produced rubber duck.
Cherino claims that they're childish toys which she has no interest in, but rumor has it one has been seen in the bathtub after she's finished...

name: Nodoka (Hot Spring)
newQuote: I will serve my guests with all my heart!
profile:
The owner of Hot Springs Resort No. 227 who runs the large resort with the Spec Ops students.

She is still suspended from the Red Winter Office, but finds herself with newfound wealth when a hot spring suddenly erupts at the Former Institute. However, her troubles continue as students with strong personalities from Red Winter Federal Academy come to disrupt her business for various reasons.

weapon.name: Sagittarius Night
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun Nodoka carries everywhere.

It is usually used to guide others around the dark paths of the hot springs resort at night, but it is also needed to "serve" rude customers.

name: Serika (New Year)
newQuote: Well, if it's for Sensei, I'll lift up a prayer or two.
profile:
The smart treasurer of the Abydos Foreclosure Task Force.

A diligent girl who works several part-time jobs to help the Foreclosure Task Force, she is now working as a miko for the new year. Serika is giving it her patented best after being told she would get higher pay if she plays a convincing miko.

weapon.name: Sincerity
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle Serika carries with her whenever she goes to work part time.

She also takes it to her part-time miko job and uses it to quiet troublemakers who cause a ruckus at the New Year's event.

name: Sena
newQuote: Where is the corpse...? I mean, where is the injured patient?
profile:
President of Gehenna's always busy Medical Emergency Club.

She transports the wounded with a stoic face no matter the situation. She may seem apathetic as she treats the wounded like inanimate cargo, but she has never once complained about transporting numerous injured people all over Gehenna.

weapon.name: Portable Emergency Kit
weapon.desc:
Sena's sawed-off grenade launcher.

Used to quickly clear obstacles during emergency dispatches. Also used to occasionally clear people who are in the way.

name: Chihiro
newQuote: New security vulnerability found.
profile:
Vice president of Veritas, Millennium Science School's hacker group.

A genius programmer with excellent hacking skills, she is not afraid of getting her hands dirty when the task demands, whether it's going undercover or in the field. She actually has common sense unlike most of Veritas' devilish members. She is always emphasizing proper hacking ethics to other members.

weapon.name: Backdoor
weapon.desc:
An automatic rifle used by Chihiro.

According to Chihiro, it's the fastest way to find out an encrypted password.

name: Saki
newQuote: Call sign, RABBIT 2. Sensitivity is good.
profile:
The point woman of SRT Academy RABBIT Squad. Call sign is "RABBIT 2."

Saki enrolled in SRT Academy to live the life of discipline she'd always dreamed of. When the academy closed down, she, along with her squad, refused to give up on their school and began camping out in the park in protest. A star student, she still carries around her textbooks and SRT manuals to this day. She enjoys foraging for wild greens and trash that can be repurposed as supplies.

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 26 Machine Gun
weapon.desc:
A standard machine gun Saki received from SRT Academy.
It's hard to maintain, but it guarantees great firepower as long as it's serviced well.

bondGear.name: SRT Standard Manual
bondGear.desc: SRT Academy's standard distribution manual, which Saki always carries with her. It's worn out from all the time spent reading and studying, but she still treasures it.

name: Kaede
newQuote: As usual, I'm gonna work hard to become a proper lady!
profile:
An enthusiastic member of the Hyakkiyako Academy Inner Discipline Club.

She used to be infamous for spreading mischief around town, but after meeting Tsubaki and Mimori by chance, she was inspired to be a proper lady like them and joined the Inner Discipline Club. Kaede never skips her training to be a proper lady, but still always seems to cause trouble.

weapon.name: Funny Fireworks
weapon.desc:
A signal pistol Kaede always carries around.
Literally, it's a gun used to signal when something is found. Kaede mainly uses it when she comes across a bad student or a rare Mushiqueen card.

bondGear.name: Mushiqueen Card Protector
bondGear.desc: A card protector designed to prevent damage. This is the standard version of the Mushiqueen protector that Kaede bought. Many official tournaments often require the use of a protector for participation.

name: Iroha
newQuote: Do you need me? Oh, well. All right, then.
profile:
A member of the Pandemonium Society.

There's nothing Iroha hates more than being bothered. She spends much of her time trying to figure out how to escape company. She even constantly carries a book around so people will leave her alone, but the Pandemonium Society (Makoto, to be exact) always interrupts her anyway. She begrudgingly serves as an executive of the Pandemonium Society, only finding comfort in their mascot, Ibuki.

weapon.name: Pandemonium Society Standard Gun
weapon.desc:
A pistol Iroha carries around.
Since Iroha is the tank commander of the Pandemonium Society, she always complains that it's cumbersome to carry around something she never uses. But she still maintains it perfectly, which is typical Iroha-behavior.

name: Hiyori
newQuote: Oh, I got lucky today. Heehee...
profile:
An Arius Squad member that gives a gloomy impression.

Hiyori follows other Arius students around, always crying about her latest heavy burden. She has low self-esteem and a negative personality. She tends to be pessimistic about everything in the world, and believes the only purpose of life is suffering.

weapon.name: Identity
weapon.desc:
A massive sniper rifle Hiyori uses.

Its 20mm bullets that accurately target enemies prove their power on the battlefield wherever bullets rain.

name: Moe
newQuote: This is RABBIT 3. Where's the next bombing site?
profile:
The operator of the SRT Academy RABBIT Squad. Call sign is RABBIT 3. 
She entered SRT Academy because she admired their massive firepower, but the academy was suddenly closed. She's currently living in a park with her platoon members. She's bizarre in that she enjoys blowing up and destroying things, but her ability as an operator is quite impressive. She's addicted to sugar and always has a lollipop in her mouth.

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 224 Pistol
weapon.desc: The standard pistol Moe was given at SRT Academy. Despite being a pistol, it has a rapid rate of fire and can empty a magazine in an instant.

name: Akane (Bunny)
newQuote: My Master's maid... Well, I guess I'm your rabbit now.
profile:
A C&C agent wearing a Bunny Girl costume as her disguise.

Even in unfamiliar environments, Akane keeps the team together, always in perfect uniform, and blazes their way forward with large amounts of C4. But she seems preoccupied lately... Maybe she's too excited about her new bunny outfit?

weapon.name: Silent Solution
weapon.desc:
This pistol is Akane's constant companion.

It's been customized to be perfect for infiltration missions.

name: Himari
newQuote: Haha! Is it finally time to shine for Millennium's super genius hacker?
profile:
The former president of Veritas, a hacker club at the Millennium School, and the current president of the Super Phenomenon Task Force.

She styles herself as a super genius hacker, and claims she has a degree in Omniscience, which only three people have received in Millennium's history. However, no one's ever been able to confirm the existence of such a degree. Himari relishes this, believing that secrets make a girl more beautiful. None can deny that she is an extremely talented hacker with a strange taste for the occult.

weapon.name: Clifftop Bloom
weapon.desc:
Himari's pistol.

A gun with a simple and elegant exterior. Himari uses it sparingly. "A flower blooming on a rocky clifftop is an extraordinary sight. Just like that flower, I'm in bloom." - Himari

name: Hanae (Christmas)
newQuote: Merry Christmas! Were you expecting Santa Claus? Your guardian angel is here instead!
profile:
A member of the Trinity Remedial Knights. She's wearing a Santa costume to celebrate Christmas.

Because she has a very active personality, Hanae needs a Santa costume that allows her freedom of movement. For a girl who finds everything exciting, Christmas is nothing less than a month-long festival. She carries bundles of presents everywhere she goes, and rings a bell to fill everyone with the spirit of the season.

weapon.name: Happy Smile Gun
weapon.desc:
Hanae's assault rifle.

Even on Christmas, a time of peace, her gun spreads joy.

bondGear.name: Hanae's Gift Sack
bondGear.desc: A pouch filled with gifts from Hanae. She's filled it with important items to help others.

name: Fuuka (New Year)
hobbies: Making home-cooked meals, packing bento lunches
newQuote: Did you have any New Year's Eve noodles? I hope everything goes well for us this year!
profile:
Fuuka is dressed up in a kimono for the New Year.

She is hoping for peaceful days in the upcoming year, but given her surroundings, that doesn't seem likely.

weapon.name: Lunch Club Defense Gun Type A
weapon.desc:
Fuuka's submachine gun.

Her wish for the New Year is that she won't have to use it, but the world doesn't always grant her wishes...

name: Kanna
newQuote: I will serve the citizens faithfully.
profile:
A police student in charge of the Public Peace Bureau at Valkyrie Police School.

She's better known by the nickname "Feral Hound," because she never gives up on a crime once it's in her sights. She'll investigate tenaciously until she uncovers the truth. People see her as hot-tempered because of her unusual, ferocious looks and her nickname, but in reality she's calm and down-to-earth.

weapon.name: Valkyrie Service Pistol No.17
weapon.desc:
The standard pistol that Kanna received from Valkyrie Police School.

Despite its rugged design, it's light and easy to operate. Kanna prefers it, since she spends more time on paperwork than fieldwork.

name: Nagisa
hobbies: Collecting tea leaves, baking pastries, gardening
newQuote: And how are you? Greetings from Trinity.
profile:
The leader of Filius, one of the allied factions that makes up Trinity General School, and the host of the Tea Party.

Although she has a sweet and friendly demeanor, she rarely reveals her true feelings, so she's not very approachable. Her hobby is preparing tea and refreshments for tea parties. Many Trinity students long to attend her get-togethers.

weapon.name: Royal Blend
weapon.desc:
Nagisa's favorite small pistol.

Its classic design fits the appearance of a host at elegant tea parties. It's essential for chasing away uninvited guests who demean the dignity of tea parties.

name: Haruka (New Year)
newQuote: This year... I-I'm gonna work like there's no tomorrow...!
profile:
An employee of Problem Solver 68.

She's excited to welcome the new year with those most important to her. She went out of her comfort zone dressing up so she could fit in with her other club members on this special occasion.

weapon.name: Blow Away
weapon.desc:
A shotgun Haruka uses to exterminate any "pests" that stand in her way.

She also uses it to exterminate real pests.

name: Minori
newQuote:
All the pudding in Kivotos for the students
who fight the good fight!
profile:
Head of Red Winter Federal Academy's Labor Party.

She dispatches and manages laborers wherever they are needed, including large-scale construction sites. Despite her ability to get any job done, she has a bad reputation with employers due to being prone to leading strikes and protests at the slightest hint of trouble.

weapon.name: Torch of Steel
weapon.desc:
Minori's favorite sturdy assault rifle.

As its name suggests, this simple assault rifle has continued to faithfully light up Minori's path of struggle.

name: Shiroko (Swimsuit)
newQuote: I'm not excited. I'm doing what I have to do.
profile:
The resident athlete of the Foreclosure Task Force, ready for her summer vacation at a deserted island resort.

Despite the difficulty of the situation, she gives her all to rebuilding the resort and gathering food. Even in a swimsuit meant for play, she doesn't lose her characteristic single-minded drive.

weapon.name: White Fang 465
weapon.desc:
Shiroko's assault rifle, favored even at sea.

Thanks to the extra care taken on its maintenance, it can handle water and salt.

name: Hinata (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Is that heavy? Would you like me to carry your bags?
profile:
A girl from the Sisterhood who came to the island to help investigate the ruins.

Even in this idyllic environment, she has a natural tendency to help everyone around her. Of course, not even Hinata can resist the relaxing effects of the lazy ocean breeze.

weapon.name: Reverence
weapon.desc:
Hinata's pistol never leaves her side, even in the summer heat.

Useful for menial tasks, such as shooting fruit down from high places.

name: Mimori (Swimsuit)
newQuote: If only we could freeze this moment in time...
profile:
The vice president of the Inner Discipline Club has changed into a swimsuit for the summer.

She's known for her gentle smile and kind demeanor, but dressing in swimwear has her a little more excited than usual.

weapon.name: Soft Resolution
weapon.desc:
Mimori's automatic pistol.

Her training to become a proper lady never ceases, even when she's at the beach in the summer.

name: Haruna (Track)
newQuote: The more you move, the more appetite you'll work up. Shall we?
profile:
Haruna has changed into her gym clothes for the Kivotos Halo Festival.

No matter where she is, Haruna's quest for food never ends. This time, she's set her eyes on the culinary delights that can only be found at Kivotos' biggest athletic event. Maybe it's because of the excitement in the air, but she seems even more friendly than usual.

weapon.name: Ideal
weapon.desc:
Haruna's sniper rifle.

She's always scoping out good food, even while exercising.

bondGear.name: Butterfly Wing Decoration
bondGear.desc: Haruna's wing decoration. She's known for switching out its decorations based on her mood and the situation.

name: Shigure (Hot Spring)
newQuote: We've soaked our outsides, so now it's time to soak our insides.
profile:
A Spec Ops student who helps run Hot Spring Resort No. 227.

When a hot spring suddenly erupted in the Former Institute, she and Nodoka opened a huge hot spring resort. Unlike Nodoka, however, she doesn't seem to be too interested in expanding the business or making money. She's thrilled for the opportunity to make all kinds of drinks and refreshments for their customers, however.

weapon.name: Spring Punch
weapon.desc:
Shigure's multi-shot grenade launcher.

The sight of her skillfully reloading grenades is supposedly one of the key attractions at Hot Springs No. 227.

name: Eimi (Swimsuit)
newQuote: Out on the sea, a swimsuit is a must!
profile:
An agent of Millennium's Super Phenomenon Task Force.

She's usually difficult to understand, but her unexpected excitement for this icy trip is easy to see. However, her fashion sense remains as bizarre as ever.

weapon.name: Multi Tactical
weapon.desc:
Eimi's favorite shotgun with a crude design.

Multifaceted like its name suggests, it can be used for various purposes even in extreme environments.

name: Makoto
newQuote:
It is time, Sensei!
You shall join the Pandemonium Society!
profile:
Pandemonium Society's Chairman.

An ambitious leader whose schemes know no bounds. Her thoughtless plans often get the group into trouble, but she brushes it off as if it wasn't all her fault. She sees Ibuki as a little sister to dote on, and Iroha as one to boss around.

weapon.name: The Honored One
weapon.desc:
Sniper rifle used by Makoto.

Makoto commissioned this masterpiece from a renowned craftsman as a representation of her authority. She rarely actually steps onto the battlefield herself though, and it doesn't see much action.

name: Akari (New Year)
newQuote: It's the new year. I should decide what to eat first. And how much!
profile:
Akari dressed up for the New Year.

She has her usual bright and cheerful smile, but Akari seems more lighthearted than usual. Is it due to the anticipation of the coming year, or...

weapon.name: Mark of Gluttony
weapon.desc:
Akari's favorite assault rifle.

Anything that hinders her travels or meals must first have a stern conversation with this firearm.

name: Tsubaki (Guide)
newQuote: Everyone...come over here...line up side by side...
profile:
The president of the Inner Discipline Club who never stops practicing good sleeping habits.

Although she has started working as a tour guide for Hyakkiyako's trips, it seems that she doesn't want to give up on her healthy sleep habits. Bouncing between moments of drowsiness and sharp focus, she faithfully upholds both commitments.

weapon.name: Sleeping Companion Ⅱ
weapon.desc:
Tsubaki's SMG.

Although typically unobtrusive during her regular tasks, this small and compact firearm seems especially helpful when she's working as a guide.

name: Serika (Swimsuit)
newQuote: I'm gonna make the most of it! Best vacation ever!
profile:
The Foreclosure Task Force's treasurer, currently at a resort pursuing the ultimate vacation.

Despite numerous challenges, she remains resilient and tackles her setbacks fearlessly, applying the same diligence to this vacation as she does her part-time jobs. Although it might seem like she's stressed from constant pressure, she is truly enjoying her time with everyone...even if she may not realize it herself.

weapon.name: Sincerity
weapon.desc:
Serika's assault rifle that she brought to the resort during her vacation.

Even off-duty, she remains on high alert. In fact, she makes sure to maintain peak physical condition, so she can enjoy her time off with 100% dedication.

name: Fubuki (Swimsuit)
newQuote: What a hassle... Do I really have to go?
profile:
A lazy police cadet from the Public Safety Bureau, dispatched on a lifeguard mission.

In the scorching summer heat, she lightheartedly tagged along after hearing about the trip to the water park. She's constantly coming up with different ways to minimize her effort output while there.

weapon.name: Valkyrie Standard Rifle No. 14
weapon.desc:
Fubuki's standard rifle from the Valkyrie Police School.

She hopes she won't need to use it while dispatched.

name: Tomoe (Qipao)
newQuote:
A new place and new clothes. How wonderful.
What would you like to discuss?
profile:
Tomoe dressed up in a qipao for the exchange event with Shanhaijing.

One might expect her to feel out of place, so far removed from Red Winter. However, she quickly adapts and blends in smoothly. She's also developed a taste for her new outfit. Keep a lookout for her sharp tongue and insight throughout this exchange event.

weapon.name: Vernost
weapon.desc:
Tomoe's sniper rifle.

She's stated that she hopes it won't be needed during the exchange meeting, but if the situation calls for it...

name: Kisaki
newQuote: Now, what will you show me?
profile:
The president of Genryumon, the student council that oversees everything that happens in Shanhaijing Academy.

She gives off an atmosphere that makes her difficult to approach with her elegant yet intimidating style of talking mixed in with her mysterious impression. However, it seems that she actually utilizes that impression of her to help with her duties. Her "disguised undercover travel," which rarely gets noticed by most people, can be quite a scene for those who are aware.

weapon.name: Know Thyself, Know Thy Enemy
weapon.desc:
Kisaki's favorite SMG.

She believes all things stem from knowing both yourself and your enemies.

name: Satsuki
newQuote:
There, there.
You want to swear loyalty to the Pandemonium Society!
profile:
Pandemonium Society member and Intelligence Committee Director.

She's very motivated to find a way to control others and researches various hypnosis methods to that end. She's only found success a handful of times. Despite her countless failures, she refuses to give up and forges on with confidence. She carries herself with composure, unless she happens upon a bug or anything remotely scary.

weapon.name: NK Delta
weapon.desc:
Satsuki's favorite pistol.

Despite its grand name, it focuses on portability over power. This is fitting for Satsuki, who avoids pain at all costs.

name: Rio
newQuote: We'll meet again in a place where light doesn't shine.
profile:
President of Seminar, the student council of Millennium School.

Her desires for peace, in Millennium and the world, drive her to do whatever she thinks is necessary. As a result, she became known as everyone's "big sister." Her stylistic and aesthetic tastes are quite unique. Her Avant Guard robot corps, which is known only to a few students, exemplifies those tastes.

weapon.name: Policy Maker
weapon.desc:
Rio's self-defense pistol.

Although she's not a particularly good shot, she carries it everywhere with her, reasoning that it would be foolish not to carry a gun in Kivotos.

name: Maki (Camp)
newQuote: Is there a good canvas I can use to express this inspiration?
profile:
A member of Veritas who dressed up in warm clothes to fight the cold winter.

Although she's feeling a bit down from leaving the warm indoors for unexpected outdoor activities, she's getting new inspirations from the unfamiliar scenery, and is making it through somehow. It's a bit of a shame that she can't log in to online communities to share this unique inspiration.

weapon.name: Auto Lacquer
weapon.desc:
Maki's multipurpose machine gun, often used to write graffiti.

It's a bit too heavy to bring along to camping trips and other outdoor activities, but her burning passion for art is not limited by location.

name: Izumi (New Year)
newQuote: Let's look for a new combination of flavors!
profile:
Even if she's in a kimono, she's still the usual Izumi.

Even on New Year's, Izumi's passion for challenging food stays strong. Perhaps that's one of the reasons why she has such a bright smile.

weapon.name: Daily Cutlery
weapon.desc:
Izumi's machine gun.

For someone on a journey to discover new flavors, there's no companion more reliable.

name: Sumire (Part-Timer)
newQuote: Hydration and nutrition are both important.
profile:
Due to a series of events, Sumire ended up working for concessions at the stadium.

However, Sumire finds a way to incorporate weights, and even the uniform, into a training exercise.

weapon.name: Modern Millennium Dumbbell
weapon.desc:
Sumire's semi-automatic shotgun.

It's said to have special effects to aid in both her weight training and part-time work.

name: Pina (Guide)
newQuote: A gangster has arrived!
profile:
For this field trip, Pina has taken on the role of a tour guide!

Working as a professional guide has done nothing to dull her uniquely bright and cheery personality, nor her relentless positivity. In fact, this passionate Festival Operations Department member is using all her best qualities to make her an even better guide. She may need a chaperone, however, to make sure she doesn't make this field trip into a vigilante experience.

weapon.name: Indiscriminate Shooter
weapon.desc:
Pina's stationary machine gun.

The non-stop heat it emits is as fiery as Pina's own heart.

name: Niya
newQuote:
Ah, I seriously have to do it, right?
Fine, fine. I'll get to work.
profile:
The president of the Allied Hyakkiyako Academy's Yin-Yang Club.

To outsiders she's the student council president, but the intricate structure of the allied academy makes her role a complicated one. Her reputation precedes her as the president who dodges responsibility...but that's just who she is. Her many schemes appear self-serving at a glance, but behind the scenes, there's much more to the story than it seems.

weapon.name: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
weapon.desc:
The pistol Niya carries around.

It's strategically worn to be easily spotted, but not a soul can testify that they've ever seen her actually use it.

name: Kikyou (Swimsuit)
hobbies: Spinning yarn, reading military history, sunbathing
newQuote: How did I end up at the sea...
profile:
The Operations Officer of the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Councill, now boldly dressed for the summer.

Even though she's showing a more daring side of herself, she's still too embarrassed to admit to her friends that she can't swim. Unfortunately, she has also agreed to join them for the Hyakkiyako Water Festival.

weapon.name: Hyakkaryouran Rifle - Keen Wisdom
weapon.desc:
A rifle that Kikyou is never seen without.

Even on the treacherous aquatic battlefield, she is poised for a flawless victory.

name: Nagisa (Swimsuit)
hobbies: Collecting tea leaves, baking pastries, gardening
newQuote: There's nothing simple about relaxation.
profile:
The host of the Tea Party and the leader of Filius.

Even though she was dragged on vacation, she's unable to stop worrying about work. However, she's having fun in her own way.

weapon.name: Royal Blend
weapon.desc:
Nagisa's favorite small pistol.

It maintains its dignified elegance even at the sandy beach.

name: Misaki (Swimsuit)
newQuote: So this is the summer ocean...
profile:
The seemingly calm and collected member of the Arius Squad.

She's trying her best to appear nonchalant, but she can't fully hide her excitement. She'll become angry if you bring it up, however.

weapon.name: Saint Predator
weapon.desc:
Misaki's portable missile.


Since it's summer, she might be able to find another exciting use for it.

name: Ritsu
newQuote: Sensei! I'm here to play!
profile:
Manager of practical activities for the Free Trade Cartel, an unofficial, illegal smuggling club.

She's the muscle of the Free Trade Cartel and the person who grew the club into what it is today. Despite this, she's laid-back and just wants to enjoy club activities with her friends.

weapon.name: Portable Drilling Machine
weapon.desc:
An SMG that Ritsu always carries with her.

She'll sometimes press its muzzle against a rock and pull the trigger to break up the stone.

name: Reisa (Magical)
newQuote: マジカル自警団、参上です！
profile:
トリニティ総合学園所属、自警団の潜入任務を遂行すべく、魔法少女のコスチュームを着ることになった少女。

幼い頃から、魔法少女モノが大好きだったからか、とても浮かれている模様。

weapon.name: シューティング☆スター
weapon.desc:
レイサの大切なショットガン。

音と光、そして火力があるから魔法の杖である、と彼女はそう主張している。

name: Yakumo
hobbies: 事業企画書の作成、鉄道路線の分析
newQuote:
本にご興味は……ありませんかぁ？
まぁまぁそう言わず、まずはお話だけでも。
profile:
レッドウィンター連邦学園所属、出版部の部長。

「レッドベア」の編集長も兼任している。一度決めると曲げない頑固な一面があり、出版部の利益のためなら手段を選ばず、無敵の行動力を発揮する。しかしそんな彼女にも、ひたむきな一面があるようで……？

weapon.name: プラウダ
weapon.desc:
ヤクモが常備している拳銃。

ヤクモは「銃には様々な使い道がある」と口癖のように言っている。その使い道の中には、怠けた作家に「締切を守らせる」こともあるのだとか。

name: Michiru (Dress)
hobbies: 新しい忍術の考案、動画作り
newQuote:
潜入任務も忍者の花形、ってね！
ドレス姿でいざ参らん！
profile:
百鬼夜行連合学院所属、忍術研究部の部長。

ファッションショーの潜入警備員として雇われ、ドレスに袖を通すことに。色々と初めての経験が多い中、忍者らしくどうあるかを考えている模様。

weapon.name: ミチル流オーバーフローショットガン
weapon.desc:
ミチルが愛用しているショットガン。

なんだか今回は、持ち主と同じく少しお淑やかになっている模様。

name: Himari (Armed)
hobbies: 今日の運勢の確認、オカルト全般
newQuote:
超天才清楚系病弱美少女のやることは変わりません。
優雅に冷静に、一つずつ対処しましょうか。
profile:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、ハッカー集団「ヴェリタス」の元部長で、現特異現象捜査部の部長。

未曾有の危機に対応すべく、特殊スーツを身に纏った。また、新たな「車椅子」のおかげで、縦横無尽に駆けることが可能となった模様。

本人は車椅子であると主張しているが、どう見てもバイクだ。

weapon.name: 高嶺の花
weapon.desc:
ヒマリが所持している拳銃。

車椅子、もといバイクに乗るようになったため、普段以上に彼女が銃を使う姿が見られるかもしれない。

name: Yuzu (Armed)
newQuote: 逃げちゃ……ダメだから……！
profile:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、ゲーム開発部の部長。

未曾有の事態に備えて、特殊スーツに身を包んでいる。スーツの仕様はリオの強い要望によって決まったのだとか。当の本人は穴があったら入りたいほど恥ずかしがっている模様。

weapon.name: にゃん's ダッシュ
weapon.desc:
ユズが普段から携帯しているグレネードランチャー。

色々なことが変わったけれど、これだけはずっと変わらない。

name: Koyuki (Pajamas)
newQuote: 行動が先、細かいことは後回し！
profile:
ミレニアムサイエンススクール所属、生徒会「セミナー」のトラブルメーカーな天才少女。

パジャマはユウカからプレゼントされたもの。着替えたとしても黒崎コユキは変わらない。いつも通り反省部屋から抜け出し、自由気ままに振る舞っている模様。

weapon.name: マリ・ガン
weapon.desc:
コユキと共にあらゆる苦難を乗り越えてきたマシンガン。

トラブルを起こす持ち主とは違い、淡々と補佐してくれる頼もしい相棒……実は何も考えてないだけかもしれない。

name: Airi
hobbies: Checking out dessert shops, tea parties
profile:
A cheerful member of the Trinity After-School Sweets Club.

Has a relaxed and easy-going personality and cherishes the time she spends sampling desserts and chatting with her friends. Her favorite dessert is ice cream, and she's recently gotten hooked on mint chocolate chip.

weapon.name: Sweet Dessert
weapon.desc:
Airi's SMG.

The name is taken from one of the desserts at a shop she frequents.

name: Fuuka
hobbies: Cooking homestyle dishes, packing bento lunches
profile:
A member of the School Lunch Club that manages Gehenna Academy's dining hall.

A kind and earnest student, making her a bit of a rarity at Gehenna. She prepares and serves hundreds of meals every morning for the students of Gehenna. She's a good cook, but her skills are written off due to the dining hall's lack of manpower. Still, she refuses to give up and is constantly looking for ways to improve the menu.

weapon.name: Lunch Club Defense Gun Type A
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun Fuuka carries everywhere.

It was originally intended to control the occasional troublemakers in the dining hall, but those troublemakers usually quiet down before Fuuka gets to use it.

name: Hanae
profile:
A cheerful and energetic first-year member of the Trinity Remedial Knights.

Hanae has a vivacious personality and a positive outlook on life, but when she sees a patient, she can get too worked up and often actually worsens their condition. She's a bit odd at times, but patients under her care seem to recover more quickly regardless of their affliction.

weapon.name: Happy Smile Gun
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle that Hanae uses when examining patients.

This rifle brings a happy smile to any patient that sees it.

name: Hare
profile:
An engineer of Veritas, the hacker group of Millennium Science School.

An unprecedented genius even amongst the brilliant minds at Millennium. Most of the school's cutting-edge technology was developed by her. Even with all these achievements, she remains humble, friendly, and considerate towards her peers.

weapon.name: Auto Aimer
weapon.desc:
An assault rifle used by Hare.

Equipped with various cutting-edge features such as automatic target aiming, but Hare never seems to use them.

bondGear.name: Athena-3
bondGear.desc: A spherical drone that always follows Hare around. Named after the goddess of wisdom, it's equipped with artificial intelligence that can experience and learn on its own, but it often works against the intentions of Hare in unexpected ways.

name: Utaha
profile:
President of the Engineering Department at Millennium Science School.

Has invented a variety of robots, if only to stake her claim to the title of president of the Engineering Department. Her pet robot Thundergun has been determined to possess combat capabilities equivalent to a hundred PMC combat automata.

weapon.name: Meister Zero
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun with a simple design that Utaha modified herself.

Can also be used as a substitute for tools, such as a hammer, thanks to its strong durability.

bondGear.name: A Meister's Toolbox
bondGear.desc:
A set of tools in a custom toolbox, assembled and organized to Utaha's preferences.
It's very likely that this set, made and maintained with a meister's pride, has no equal in all of Kivotos.

name: Ayane
profile:
The diligent secretary of the Abydos Foreclosure Task Force.

A hard-working stickler for rules and regulations, she does her best to contribute to the revitalization of Abydos High School.

weapon.name: Common Sense
weapon.desc:
A cute pistol.

You will hardly ever see this pistol as long as you speak and act with common sense in front of Ayane.

name: Shizuko
hobbies: Serving and charming customers, Idol Punch
profile:
President of the Festival Operations Department at Hyakkiyako Academy.

The mascot of Momoyodou, the Hyakkiyako's traditional tea house. Acts clumsy, but only because it sells her image as an idol. In truth, she's an expert flirt willing to do anything for the success of the festivals and Momoyodou. Wears her heart on her sleeve, making her an easy read for her friends as well as Sensei.

weapon.name: Sakura Bonbon
weapon.desc:
A pump-action shotgun used by Shizuko.

According to Shizuko, "It is a one-of-a-kind weapon that has a faint scent of anmitsu, a specialty of Momoyodou."

bondGear.name: Worn Teaware Set
bondGear.desc: Shizuko's first tea set. While it shows its age, it also carries Shizuko's memory of brewing her first cup of tea.

name: Hanako
profile:
A friendly girl from the Make-Up Work Club.

She may appear like a quiet and elegant young lady at first, but a bevy of inappropriate and lewd comments spew out any time Hanako opens her mouth. Every member of the Make-Up Work Club gets nervous whenever Hanako starts speaking.

weapon.name: Honest Wish
weapon.desc:
Hanako's assault rifle.

It has a rather straightforward name.
She won't answer when asked about its meaning, however.

bondGear.name: Suspicious Classical Literature
bondGear.desc: Hanako's most prized possession. Despite having been confiscated over and over again, this book always ends up back in her hands.

name: Mari
profile:
A sincere and benevolent girl affiliated with the Sisterhood.

She always greets Trinity students with a friendly smile. Despite her cuteness, many come to her for counseling because of the calm and relaxing air about her. She is self-critical and always considers herself as lacking, but she dreams of becoming a great Sister like her upperclassmen.

weapon.name: Piety
weapon.desc:
A pistol carried by Mari.

Despite always being on her person, nobody has actually seen her use it.

bondGear.name: Neat White Corsage
bondGear.desc: A corsage she bought with the resolve to never forget her original intentions in joining the Sisterhood, like a white flower that doesn't wilt. That's the idea, at least...

name: Chinatsu
profile:
She is in charge of medical aid at Gehenna Academy's Prefect Team.

Chinatsu is one of the few people with common sense among the obsessively dogmatic Prefect Team. She's usually the one who prevents other members like Ako and Iori from running amok. Her tone can be harsh and give the impression of being just as cold as any other member of the Prefect Team, but she is actually a sweet young girl who melts at the sight of cute animals.

weapon.name: Support Pointer
weapon.desc:
Chinatsu's favorite pistol.

It is more often used to point at something than to shoot someone.

bondGear.name: Chinatsu's Medical Bag
bondGear.desc: Chinatsu has been carrying this big bag with her since her time in the Medical Emergency Club. The bag is still bursting with medical supplies, indicating how much Chinatsu still cares.

name: Kotama
profile:
A hacker of Veritas, Millennium Science School's infamous hacking group.

Wiretapping is her specialty, and she takes great pleasure in eavesdropping on other people's private conversations. A socially awkward young lady who addresses even younger students with formal deference. In real life, she's mousy and shy, but on the internet she's a surprisingly glib wordsmith.

weapon.name: Echo Link
weapon.desc:
A pistol that Kotama always carries around.

This model has minimized noise when firing to prevent it from interfering while listening in on wiretaps.

name: Juri
profile:
A member of the School Lunch Club that manages Gehenna Academy's dining hall.

Like Fuuka, she's a hard worker who pours her heart and soul into cooking meals for the other students. However, her cooking is so bad that it's grotesque, so her efforts are ultimately useless. But she continues to strive to hopefully improve her cooking under Fuuka's encouragement and guidance.

weapon.name: Lunch Club Defense Gun Type B
weapon.desc:
A shotgun carried by Juri.

Originally intended to control the troublemakers in the dining hall,
but for some reason, Juri uses it as a cooking tool.

name: Serina
profile:
A kind-hearted girl affiliated with the Trinity Remedial Knights.

A virtuous person who enjoys charity work, her concern for the health of those around her has earned her a reputation as a sort of mother hen. Despite having a somewhat timid personality and avoiding quarrels and conflict, she is always ready to stand up against enemies who threaten the peace.

weapon.name: Tactical Therapy
weapon.desc:
Serina's special assault rifle.

Pulling the trigger injects shots, but not the kind that heal.

name: Shimiko
profile:
Librarian of the Trinity Library Committee.

A bookworm and a bibliophile, she is one of the few students who has read every single tome in Trinity Library. She loves recommending books as much as she does reading them, and has a habit of making book recommendations to people she's just met based on their preferences.

weapon.name: Library Ruler
weapon.desc:
A rifle used by Shimiko.

It's her reliable disciplinary sidekick for when things get rowdy in the library.

name: Yoshimi
profile:
A member of the Trinity After-School Sweets Club.

A girl with a height complex that gives off the impression of a small, angry animal. Constantly fixated on appearing more mature, her tendency to wear her heart on her sleeve gets her into trouble. She can't help but smile widely when visiting dessert cafes to sample the latest limited-edition treats.

weapon.name: Sweet Driver
weapon.desc:
Yoshimi's exclusive rifle.

The dessert competitions in Kivotos are often accompanied by strong force.

bondGear.name: Dessert Raider
bondGear.desc: A spork exclusively for Yoshimi. She carries it with her at all times for quick use in emergencies. Even after years of use, it's still considered a luxury item.

name: Nodoka
profile:
A student suspended from Red Winter Academy and on probation in Former Institute 227.

She was suspended for constantly monitoring Sensei through a telescope. Nodoka wants to observe the world's beauty and sees Sensei in the same vein. Being in Spec Ops No. 227 has taught her to be careful with what little money she has to get by.

weapon.name: Sagittarius Night
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun that Nodoka often uses when she goes out to make astronomical observations.

A flashlight is attached to illuminate the road on dark nights.

name: Ayane (Swimsuit)
profile:
The secretary of the Abydos Foreclosure Task Force who flew the group to the beach for summer vacation. 
She wants to forget about her arduous daily grind and have a pleasant vacation, but she can never hide her strong work ethic, even while relaxing.

weapon.name: Common Sense
weapon.desc: Ayane's pistol that she hoped she would never have to use. That wish is constantly shattered by their absurd adventures.

name: Shizuko (Swimsuit)
hobbies: Serving and charming customers, Idol Punch
profile: President of the Festival Department, full of ambition and aspirations for the summer. The president's passion is to spread Momoyodou franchises all over Kivotos. Any difficulty or obstacle is no problem as long as she has Idol Punch. She has nothing to fear and is determined to achieve anything that's within her reach.

weapon.name: Sakura Bonbon
weapon.desc: A pump-action shotgun that Shizuko uses at the beach. The scent of anmitsu still lingers. Now's the time to spread that scent to the entire resort!

name: Yuzu (Maid)
profile:
The president of the Millennium Game Development Department. She began wearing a maid uniform after being mistaken for a C&C member.

The new outfit might not have transformed her into an outgoing extrovert, but it did give her the confidence to leave her room! With scary and unfamiliar events occurring all around her, Yuzu does her best to overcome each obstacle with the Game Development Department's support.

weapon.name: Nyan's Dash
weapon.desc:
Yuzu's grenade launcher.

It had to be designed to be able to fire grenades under any circumstances, considering her habit of trying to fight from the safety of her box.

name: Miyu (Swimsuit)
profile:
The RABBIT Squad's sniper, who's visiting a remote fishing village on an undercover operation.

She brought her fishing tackle to blend in and spends most of her time at the docks. Occasionally, she catches an unexpected big fish and attracts the attention of other anglers, but...her natural lack of presence remains strong even in this peculiar village.

weapon.name: RABBIT Type 39 Rifle
weapon.desc:
Standard rifle issued to Miyu from SRT Academy.

The simple yet sturdy construction of the bolt-action allows you to snipe down enemies in harsh sea winds without malfunctioning.

name: Saten Ruiko
hobbies: Online mahjong, hunting down new desserts
profile:
A cheerful student from Sakugawa Middle School.

She was introduced to Misaka Mikoto, an upperclassman from Tokiwadai Middle School, by her good friend and classmate Uiharu Kazari. Although she is a Level 0 without any powers, she has good instincts and a knack for tracking down clues. Her favorite things are urban legends and desserts. She makes a point of trying out new desserts in her free time.

weapon.name: Bullet Swinger
weapon.desc:
A personalized firearm made for Saten Ruiko by the Engineering Department.

Sturdy enough to be used as a makeshift bludgeon.

name: Kirino (Swimsuit)
profile:
A passionate cadet of the Valkyrie Police School's Public Safety Bureau, now in lifeguard-mode.

She's full of enthusiasm for her mission, but her skills fall short. Despite this, she is ever-diligent in her work and puts in her full effort to live up to her role as a lifeguard.

weapon.name: Valkyrie Service Pistol No.3
weapon.desc:
Kirino's service pistol from the Valkyrie Police School.

Her sense of duty as a lifeguard seems to have improved her accuracy rate.

name: Atsuko (Swimsuit)
profile:
An Arius Squad member who came to the beach to have fun.

She's more excited than usual, as this is her first time coming to a beach, let alone a beach festival. She's trying to preserve the day's moments through a cheap digital camera she bought at the Black Market.

weapon.name: Scorpius
weapon.desc:
A submachine gun Atsuko uses.

It's taking part in protecting the Squad's summer.

name: Karin (School)
profile:
A C&C agent deployed as a guide for the Millennium Expo.

On top of her basic guide work, she also becomes a bodyguard for students when needed. Secretly enjoys the ordinary school uniform she's wearing for the occasion, as she almost never gets a chance to wear one. Thanks to her unique and kind personality, students who'd been afraid of her before are now getting to know and like her.

weapon.name: Big Eye
weapon.desc:
Karin's massive, custom sniper rifle.

No matter the target, she shoots it down with pinpoint accuracy.

name: Ichika (Swimsuit)
hobbies: Helping others and trying new things
profile:
A member of the Justice Task Force who's trying to stay relaxed, even on the sea.

While she's known for being kind and easygoing, her patience is put to the test upon reuniting with her worst enemy. Although she doesn't intend to, the stress makes her more open with her honest feelings.

weapon.name: Red Dragon
weapon.desc:
Ichika and this assault rifle have been together through thick and thin.

Even though it looks unassuming on the outside, her rough treatment has left its share of dents.
